title: Admin Assistant for High-Level Clients
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Administrative Assistant. This role is responsible for overseeing Mike Barron’s high-level clients. The Administrative Assistant will work directly with the owner of the company and the supervisors, who will play a vital role in supporting our high-level students, ensuring their success when it comes to building a company. Your primary responsibility will be to manage high level accounts, keep these accounts organized, work with the owner of the company when it comes to scheduling, ensure that these clients are completing the program and utilizing all inside personnel to get tasks completed.



Responsibilities:

Work directly with founder Mike Barron and his supervisors to manage and support high-level client accounts.

Schedule meetings between Mike Barron, supervisors, and partners to ensure alignment and progress.

Equip partners with the essential tools they need for success.

Serve as the primary point of contact for partners, handling communication across various channels with professionalism and efficiency.

Manage invitations to partner events featuring Mike Barron, confirming attendance and ensuring seamless coordination.

Oversee client progress in programs, ensuring they are meeting milestones and utilizing all available resources and personnel.

Keep accounts and schedules organized to streamline operations and enhance client satisfaction.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant or in a similar role.

Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with scheduling tools.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a client-focused approach.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.



For faster processing, please send resumes to 
 (
).

title: Real Estate Lead Engagement Specialist
description:
US Real Estate Brokerage — Experienced, High-Level Applicants Only

Company Overview



We are a fast-growing US-based real estate brokerage seeking an exceptional Virtual Assistant to join our team. We pride ourselves on high-level communication, professionalism, and efficiency—qualities we expect from every tea
mber.



If you have advanced education, outstanding English proficiency, and a strong background in lead outreach, this role is designed for you.



***Only Apply through job portal, applications/resumes submitted outside of portal will not be considered. 

Position Summary



-As our Lead Engagement Specialist, you will take the lead in contacting, nurturing, and converting warm and cool leads through outbound calls, texts, and
s. Your job is to create meaningful conversations, understand client needs, and schedule qualified appointments for our agents. This is a performance-driven position where experience truly matters.



Key Responsibilities



-High-volume outbound calls, texts, and
s to warm and cool leads.

-Build rapport quickly, understand lead motivation, and guide them through early stages of their home search or selling journey.

-Set appointments and consultations directly with our real estate agents.

-Accurately update lead notes, stages, and dispositions inside Follow Up Boss (FUB).

-Maintain a polished, professional communication style at all times.



Required Qualifications



-Master’s degree or higher (any field).

-Exceptional English proficiency — near-native spoken and written communication is required.

-Extensive experience in lead outreach, cold/warm calling, or inside sales.

-Experience using Follow Up Boss (FUB) is strongly preferred.

-Reliable high-speed internet, modern computer, and noise-cancelling headset.

-Strong attention to detail, critical thinking, and time-management skills.

-Ability to work independently, follow processes, and meet performance expectations.



Work Schedule



9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time)

This role requires consistent availability during these hours.



Compensation & Growth



-Competitive pay based on experience and skill level.

-Opportunities for advancement within our growing company.

-Ongoing training and support to elevate your performance and success.



Application Requirements

Applications missing any required item will not be reviewed.

Please submit ALL of the following:



-Your resume/C.V.

-A brief cover letter describing your experience with lead outreach and why you’re a strong fit.

-A short audio introduction demonstrating your English proficiency.

-Your computer specs and peripherals (headset, microphone, etc.).

Compensation Structure Base Pay



Base salary of $1,400 USD with monthly bonuses that bring total to $1,600 USD



Overview

We are a growing real estate investment company managing a portfolio of residential rental properties. We’re seeking a highly organized, proactive Remote Property Manager & Operations Coordinator to oversee day-to-day property operations, tenant communication, and administrative coordination as we scale.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives on ownership, follow-through, and keeping systems running smoothly. You’ll work closely with ownership and play a key role in managing tenants, vendors, and internal operations.

Key Responsibilities Property Management

Manage approximately 17+ rental units, scaling over time

Handle tenant communication (rent reminders, maintenance requests, general inquiries)

Track rent payments and follow up on delinquencies

Coordinate maintenance requests and vendor scheduling

Ensure utilities remain active and accounts stay current

Monitor lease compliance and assist with renewals

Track vacancies and coordinate turnover tasks

Administrative & Office Support

Manage shared inboxes and route messages appropriately

Track and update records in property management software

Coordinate with title companies, inspectors, and vendors

Assist with document organization, contracts, and recordkeeping

Maintain up-to-date status notes for each property

Operations & Growth Support

Assist with onboarding new properties as portfolio expands

Help implement and maintain repeatable systems and processes

Support reporting and organization for ownership review

What We’re Looking For

Strong organizational and follow-through skills

Excellent written communication (English)

Comfort managing multiple systems and priorities

Proactive problem-solver who takes ownership

Prior experience in property management, real estate ops, or admin support preferred

Reliable internet and availability during U.S. business hours

Why This Role Is Different

Clear expectations and performance metrics

No micromanagement — autonomy and trust

Long-term growth opportunity with increasing responsibility

Stable, recurring work with predictable income

This is a long-term role with growth potential. Compensation increases as the portfolio grows and responsibilities expand.

title: Design Operations Associate
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Design Operations Associate to support our architectural and design team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working behind the scenes, and can keep projects, people, and systems running smoothly.



You will play a key role in ensuring the design department operates efficiently by handling administrative tasks, coordinating workflows, managing resources, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines and delivering high-quality work.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide efficient virtual office management support, including accurate processing of invoices, maintaining digital records, and assisting with online procurement tasks.

- Assist and coordinate with designers to ensure project tracking data is accurate and up to date.

- Help manage team accounts, assist with logins, and provide guidance on using tools such as Docusign, Dialpad, Lark Payment Requests, and others.

- Support designers with operational tasks such as sending documents via Docusign, submitting payment requests, scheduling meetings, coordinating projects, and working with other departments.

- Coordinate with consultants, request proposals, assist in scheduling site visits, track progress, and ensure timely submission of payments.

- Support the recruiting process for the design department by collating applicants from different platforms and scheduling interviews for shortlisted candidates.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering, or a related field.

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

- Basic knowledge of Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.

- Strong communication and presentation skills.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Knowledge of industry-specific standards, if applicable.



Why This Role is a Great Fit

- Long-term, stable remote role with a growing design team

- Work closely with architects, designers, and project managers

- Opportunity to grow within operations and project coordination

- Exposure to real-world architectural and construction workflows



How to Apply

Please submit your application along with your resume and a brief note/portfolio about your experience in operations, or any relevant experience.

title: Owner Relations Property Manager
description:
Navigate Stays is seeking a dedicated Owner Property Manager to serve as the primary point of contact for property owners. This role is responsible for conducting owner phone calls, managing owner relationships, tracking and resolving owner-reported issues, and ensuring exceptional communication and service delivery.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Owner Communication & Relationship Management



Conduct scheduled and ad-hoc phone calls with property owners

Serve as primary point of contact for owner inquiries, concerns, and feedback

Build and maintain strong, trust-based relationships with property owners

Proactively update owners on property performance, bookings, and issues

Handle owner concerns with professionalism, empathy, and urgency



2. Issue Tracking & Resolution



Track all owner-reported issues in the property management system

Document issues thoroughly with details, timelines, and priority levels

Coordinate with internal teams (maintenance, cleaning, guest services) to resolve issues

Follow up with owners to ensure issues are resolved to their satisfaction

Escalate complex or urgent issues to leadership as needed



3. Owner Support & Service



Answer owner questions about bookings, property performance, operations

Address billing inquiries and coordinate with accounting team

Educate owners on Navigate Stays processes, policies, and best practices

Gather owner feedback and identify opportunities for service improvement



4. Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of all owner communications and issues

Update property management system with owner preferences, notes, and issue status

Generate reports on owner satisfaction, common issues, and resolution times

Participate in tea
etings to share owner insights and trends





REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:

? Excellent verbal and written communication skills

? Strong customer service orientation with focus on relationship building

? Ability to handle difficult conversations with professionalism and empathy

? Highly organized with strong attention to detail

? Ability to manage multiple priorities and follow up consistently

? Proficiency with property management software, or willingness to learn

? Problem-solving mindset and ability to work independently

? Professional phone presence and active listening skills



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:



Experience in property management, hospitality, or customer success

Familiarity with vacation rental operations and owner expectations

Experience using Guesty, EzAide, or similar property management platforms

Background in account management or client relations





KEY COMPETENCIES:

Communication Excellence

Ability to communicate clearly, professionally, and empathetically with property owners across various situations—from routine updates to sensitive issue resolution.

Relationship Management

Skilled at building trust and rapport with owners, understanding their needs and concerns, and maintaining positive long-term relationships.

Issue Resolution

Proactive approach to identifying, tracking, and resolving owner issues efficiently while keeping all parties informed throughout the process.

Organizational Skills

Ability to manage multiple owner accounts, track numerous issues simultaneously, and maintain detailed documentation without losing track of priorities.

Empathy & Patience

Understands that property owners have significant financial investment in their properties and can navigate emotional conversations with care and professionalism.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

? Owners feel heard, valued, and confident in Navigate Stays' management

? Owner-reported issues are tracked, resolved promptly, and followed up on consistently

? Owner satisfaction scores and retention rates improve over time

? Clear documentation allows anyone on the team to understand owner history

? Owners proactively refer new property owners to Navigate Stays



WORK ENVIRONMENT:



Must be available for scheduled owner calls during business hours

Collaborative team environment with regular check-ins and support

Access to property management software, CRM tools, and communication platforms





HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role to:

Create realistic AI UGC videos

Use tools like VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, and similar AI video/voice tools

Apply lip sync, voiceovers, and editing to make ads feel real and natural



We are currently doing $300K–$500K/month in revenue, so there is a lot of volume and testing.



We are NOT looking to train someone. You must already be operating at a high level.

We need someone who can plug in immediately and perform.



Compensation



We offer a 2000$ monthly salary + high performance bonuses.



This means:



You earn bonuses on winning creatives

This can be:

Fixed bonus per winning ad

Or a % of ad spend



Top performers in our team earn more than standard fixed salary roles because of this structure.



Requirements

Proven experience with AI UGC ad creation for Meta ads

Experience with lip sync, voiceovers, and realistic AI avatars

Strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct response marketing

Experience working with e-commerce brands (Shopify, DTC)

Ability to work fast and produce consistently





Big Plus



Experience creating storefront / owner-style ads

Understanding of what makes ads scale (not just look good)

Experience with high-volume creative production

You cannot show real examples of ads you created

Tools you use (VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Your expected monthly salary in USD

title: Have a Business — or Want to Start One? Let’s Build It (Shark Tank Style)
description:
I’m looking for serious, driven individuals — especially based in the Philippines or working online — who either:



Already have a business

OR

Have a strong idea and want to build one

This is not a job. This is an opportunity to build something real together.



 What I Want From You

Think Shark Tank style — clear, honest, and to the point.

1. Tell me about YOU

Who are you?

What skills do you have?

What have you done before (work, business, freelancing, etc.)?

2. Your BUSINESS (or idea)

Do you already have a business? If yes, explain it.

If not, what do you want to start?

Why this business?

3. COST

How much money do you need to start or grow?

What will the money be used for?

4. CLIENTS

How will we get customers?

Be specific 
, cold outreach, referrals, ads, etc.)

How much can this realistically make per month?

Break it down simple.



What I’m Looking For

People who take action, not just talk

 What Happens Next

If your idea or business makes sense:

I may help fund it

I may help grow it

We build it together and scale

 

Final Note

Don’t overthink it. Simple wins.

Send your idea like you’re pitching for real money.

Let’s see what you’ve got.

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

THE ROLE:

Apply with:

 handle

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

title: AI Static Ads Editor (Direct Response Ads | HER+)
description:
Are you obsessed with AI, creative testing, and building high-converting ad creatives at scale?



At HER+, we’re one of the fastest-growing women’s wellness brands and we’re leveraging AI to push creative production faster than ever.



We’re looking for an AI Static Editor who can create high-converting static ads using advanced prompting, AI tools, and direct-response principles.



Responsibilities

- Create high-performing static ad creatives daily using AI tools

- Write and refine prompts to generate scroll-stopping images and concepts

- Turn winning angles into multiple creative variations quickly

- Collaborate with our creative strategist to test new hooks, concepts, and offers

- Analyze top-performing ads and replicate/improve them using AI

- Produce 20+ static creatives per day for testing



Requirements

- MUST be highly proficient in AI prompting (this is non-negotiable)

- Experience using tools like Claude, Higgsfield, and other AI image generation platforms

- Strong understanding of direct-response marketing & ad creatives

- Ability to turn one idea into multiple high-converting variations quickly



Important: Put your favorite color in the subject line and submit a link with your best statics or your application will be ignored

title: Associate Attorney | USA HOURS
description:
Hi, do you have drafting and case management experience along with very good English? Are you detail oriented, organized, and friendly?



Our law firm is looking for someone to support our attorneys with case and motion drafting, preparing and filing cases, proactively managing the progress of a case, tracking deadlines, case and law research, and negotiating settlements. We value thoughtful, well spoken, and curious people that want to grow with the firm. This is a long term, full time position working US hours (we're 13 hours behind).



We're a growing US law firm and offer job security, good pay, long term potential. Everyone is treated respectfully and encouraged to share any ideas on how to improve the business and the work is meaningful as we help people that need our help. You will work with a team of ph VAs as well as our USA based team.



We are a performance based team where everyone's contributions are important. Our culture is positive and professional and we thrive in delivering an outstanding customer experience to our clients.



We are looking for candidates with 2-5 years of experience as an attorney. Attention to detail and a growth mindset are a must. 



We defend clients being sued by financial companies, and turn around and sue those same companies under federal laws including the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act and Fair Credit Reporting Act as well as Illinois state laws like the Debt Settlement Consumer Protection Act and Illinois Consumer Fraud Act. Don't worry, we will teach you.



Look us up at 
 and check out our google reviews to see what our clients think of us. If this sounds like something you'd like to talk more about please apply through onlinejobs.ph with your resume and a link to a short video 30-60 seconds in length introducing yourself and why you are interested in working with our firm.

 responses

title: Sales Assistant
description:
ScaleValley is an AI-powered SEO platform that grows organic traffic on autopilot. Customers connect their site, and we handle everything: keyword research, content, publishing, and backlinks. We're launching now and need someone to manage our sales outreach and close deals.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY:



Most outreach is automated — you push a few buttons and 200+
s go out. Your job is to manage what comes back: reply to interested leads, follow up with prospects, send LinkedIn DMs to creators and founders, and hop on Zoom demos when someone wants to see the product.



You'll work across three channels: agency partnerships (primary), newsletter placements, and creator/LinkedIn outreach. We give you the leads, the tools, the scripts, and the
 sequences. You bring the follow-through.



WE PROVIDE:

- 10,000+ agency leads

- 100+ newsletter contacts

- Outreach automation &
 sequences

- Demo scripts and objection handling docs

- Direct founder access for pricing questions



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

- Strong written and spoken English (you'll write replies and run live calls)

- Experience in sales, lead gen, or outreach (B2B preferred)

- Comfortable on Zoom demos

- Organized, reliable follow-up without reminders

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be told what to do next



COMPENSATION:

- $1,500/mo base salary

- 8% of new monthly revenue from partners you close, paid for 3 months per deal

- Uncapped bonuses — strong performers hit $5,000–$6,000/mo total



HOW TO APPLY:



Send a cover letter answering BOTH of these questions (no answer = no review):



Start application with letter X



1. Tell us about a deal or sale you closed. What was it, how did you find the lead, and what happened when it stalled? 



2. You've sent 200 outreach
s over 5 days, got a 2% reply rate, zero demos booked. What do you do on Day 6?

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Position: Graphic Designer

Status: 10-15 Hours/Week

Payrate: $5-$7/Hour based on experience



About Funny How:

____________________________________________________________________________________________ 

At Funny How, we believe life change should be both purpose-driven and fun. What started as stand-up comedy has grown into a movement: Funny How Life Works, Funny How Marriage Works, with more to come.  Our mission is to use humor, storytelling, and the wisdom God has given us to help people break free from feeling stuck and live out their full God-given purpose—with joy along the way. We are a warm, relational, and mission-driven team. We take our calling seriously, but we never forget that laughter is a gift that keeps us grounded and connected.



Position Summary

____________________________________________________________________________________________

We are looking for an experienced professional to join our team as a Graphic Designer at Funny How. You’ll be  our go to resource for all of our graphic design needs.



Key Responsibilities

____________________________________________________________________________________________

    Design graphics for sales
s and marketing campaigns

    Create social media posts and visual content for various platforms

    Produce presentation slides for live events and speaking engagements

    Design eye-catching thumbnails for videos and digital content

    Create graphics for paid advertising campaigns

    Turn around design requests in a timely, reasonable manner

Qualifications

____________________________________________________________________________________________

Graphic design background

Fluent English communication skills (written)

Extremely competent at photo editing and design

Has access to photo editing/design software (type of software flexible)

Portfolio demonstrating graphic design work (required)

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision





Expectations

____________________________________________________________________________________________

title: Outbound Sales Specialist
description:
We are a California-based company providing outsourced staffing solutions to U.S. businesses. We are currently looking for a driven and confident Outbound Sales Specialist to lead our outbound prospecting efforts. This is a performance-focused role for someone who is comfortable speaking with business owners, handling objections, and booking qualified meetings.



If you thrive in a target-driven environment and enjoy building conversations that lead to results, we want you on our team.



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct outbound cold calls to small and mid-sized U.S. businesses

• Prospect, qualify leads, and identify decision-makers

• Clearly communicate our value proposition and handle objections professionally

• Book qualified appointments for the closing team

• Maintain accurate CRM records and activity tracking

• Consistently meet daily and weekly performance targets

• Continuously improve outreach strategies and call performance



Qualifications

• Proven experience in cold calling, outbound sales, or B2B lead generation

• Strong verbal English communication skills

• Confident, professional, and persuasive phone presence

• Experience using CRM systems and dialers is preferred

• Comfortable working during U.S. business hours (PST)

• Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment



Compensation

• Competitive salary

• 13th Month Pay

• Annual Base Salary Increases

• Performance-based commission bonus

• Clear performance metrics and growth opportunities



Compensation structure is designed to reward high performers who consistently generate qualified appointments and contribute to revenue growth.



What We’re Looking For

We value individuals who:

• Are resilient and handle rejection professionally

• Stay motivated by targets and results

• Continuously look for ways to improve their performance

• Take ownership of their numbers



How to Apply

• To apply, please submit your application here: 

• ONLY applications submitted through the provided link will be considered. Thank you!

title: Social Media Assistant (Content + Video + Community Operator)
description:
Flexible hours (async-friendly, non-US hours OK).  Option of part time or full time. 



We’re a growing children’s toy brand building social content that blends founder storytelling and character-driven storytelling.

We’re looking for someone who can create and edit content, engage the community, and help keep things running behind the scenes.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Create & edit short-form video and carousel (Reels/TikTok) 

Strong hooks, clean pacing, text overlays

Help write & shape social captions (including founder content)

Post on Instagram, monitor basic metrics, flag what’s working



MUST HAVES

Strong short-form video editing skills (important)

Comfortable sourcing or creating content

Social media native—you understand what performs

Clear, natural writer

Good instincts for engaging content

Organized and reliable

Basic understanding of AI content generation (ie, Gemini) + analytics

Ideally, you also have experience with kids / parenting content + Open to marketing and admin support over time



TO APPLY:

1. REQUIRED:  Please take the time to provide this customized response; missing this will disqualify your application. 



Share 2–3 content pieces you’ve edited (Reels/TikTok preferred), and for each:

-What exactly did you do? (cuts, pacing, hook, captions, etc.)

-What was the goal of the content? 

-Anything you'd change? 



2. REQUIRED: In the subject line, please write your favorite children’s or parenting social media account.



3. BONUS / OPTIONAL: 

Show how you would turn below prompt into a 15–30 second video (Reels/TikTok).  The goal of this is to understand how you think about content...not how polished your output is.



You can either:

Write it out (structure + editing approach), OR

Submit a rough video (not required, not polished)



Prompt: 

A kid refuses to wear shoes and insists socks are enough.

The parent explains why shoes matter.

The kid keeps negotiating with funny “solutions.”

In the end, the kid still doesn’t wear shoes.



Include

Opening hook (first 1–2 seconds)

What happens next (start ? middle ? end)

On-screen text or captions

How you’d approach pacing or cuts



We are looking forward to moving quickly with candidates who meet the skill requirements!

title: AI Generalist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



I’m looking for people who are tired of rigid corporate structures, endless rules, and limited growth.



This is not a typical “assistant” role.



I’m building a more human, modern alternative to agencies like Athena, with better pay, more ownership, and real opportunities to grow.



We already have a pipeline of clients. Now I’m looking for the right people to grow with.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You’ll work directly with business owners, CEOs and their direct reports to:

- Support day to day operations

- Work with AI tools, agents, and automations

- Bridge the gap between humans and AI systems

- Help businesses move from manual work to automated processes

- Continuously improve workflows and efficiency



This is a generalist role - no two days look the same.



WHO THIS IS FOR

- You’re hungry for growth

- You want more than just tasks — you want responsibility

- You’re comfortable with change, ambiguity, and learning fast

- You have experience in: customer support, executive assistance, operations or similar generalist roles

- You're comfortable working in the US time zones (PST/EST)



MOST IMPORTANTLY: You’re excited about AI and the future of work



WHAT YOU WILL GET

- Better pay than typical VA roles

- Performance-based bonuses (KPIs)

- Yearly salary reviews

- Direct training and mentorship

- Real exposure to how businesses operate

- A path to grow into higher level roles



WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT



This is not a task based job.



You won’t be:

- stuck doing repetitive work

- managed by layers of bureaucracy



Instead:



You’ll be part of a small, fast moving setup where your work actually matters.



FINAL NOTE



If you’re looking for something stable and predictable, this is probably not for you.



If you’re looking to grow, learn, and take ownership - we should talk.



SALARY



The salary indicated in the post is a STARTING BASE.

title: eLearning Video Editor
description:
American Medical Compliance is seeking a skilled and detail-oriented eLearning Video Editor to produce high-quality, engaging video content for training, marketing, and digital platforms and join our Development Team.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and can manage projects independently. The role focuses on creating engaging, high-quality video content while working with modern editing tools and evolving production workflows.



Job Details:

Schedule: Mondays to Fridays; 8 AM to 5 PM Mountain Standard Time

Work type: Full-time; Work from Home set-up

Start Date: ASAP



Key Responsibilities

• Edit and produce high-quality video content using Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects 

• Create and manage AI-generated videos using Synthesia or similar platforms 

• Enhance videos with motion graphics, animations, transitions, sound design, and visual effects 

• Adapt content for multiple formats: social media, websites, e-learning modules, ads, and corporate training 

• Collaborate remotely with cross-functional teams to align with brand guidelines and creative direction 

• Ensure accuracy, consistency, and timely delivery of all video outputs 

• Handle revisions efficiently based on stakeholder feedback 

• Organize and maintain project files and assets for scalability and reuse 



Requirements

• 3–5 years of professional experience in video editing or post-production 

• Advanced proficiency in: 

o Adobe Premiere Pro 

o Adobe After Effects 

o Synthesia or similar AI video tools 

• Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and composition 

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines independently 

• Experience with multilingual or localized content production 

• Familiarity with AI tools and automated video workflows 

• Background in corporate, healthcare, compliance, or e-learning content 

• Basic knowledge of graphic design tools (e.g., Photoshop, Illustrator) 



Preferred Qualification (not required but a PLUS)

• Proficiency in Spanish and/or French (reading, editing subtitles, or voice sync)

title: Podcast & Video Editor + YouTube Growth Strategist
description:
PODCAST & VIDEO EDITOR + YOUTUBE GROWTH STRATEGIST

Part-Time (8-9 hrs/week) – $8–$11 USD/hour – Remote, Philippines



Elevation Movement is looking for a reliable, multi-skilled Podcast & Video Editor to handle our podcast production, YouTube growth, and video content editing.



This is not an entry-level role — you must be highly organized, able to follow detailed workflows, meet deadlines without reminders, and keep us 2–3 episodes ahead at all times.





HOURS & PAY



$8–$11 USD/hour (based on experience)

10–15 hrs/week to start — may grow over time

Flexible hours, but deadlines are non-negotiable



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 



PODCAST MANAGEMENT (Riverside + Acast + The Untethered Podcast)

-Edit audio/video from Riverside with professional polish

-Add official podcast intro (from Google Drive) and Hallie’s recorded intro to each episode

-Follow timestamp notes for edits (provided in 
)

-Work with content team to ensure full show notes are pasted on all platforms

-Publish episodes to Acast, WordPress website, and YouTube — making sure all three platforms are connected



YOUTUBE CHANNEL GROWTH & MONETIZATION

-Upload episodes with optimized titles, descriptions, tags, and thumbnails

-Implement growth and monetization strategies to increase views, subscribers, and ad revenue

-Track and report analytics with recommendations



SHORT-FORM & SOCIAL CONTENT

-Review Riverside-generated 1-min clips, select/edit 3 options, send to Hallie for final choice

-Add captions/text overlays and prep for scheduling on social media

-Create YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikTok clips from podcast content (AI tools and manual editing)



COURSE & SOCIAL MEDIA VIDEO EDITING

-Edit course videos for Kajabi (or similar) with clean audio, synced video, and high-quality production

-Troubleshoot A/V issues quickly

-Assist in editing for social media campaigns when needed



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

-Proven podcast editing experience — portfolio with audio + video samples required

-Skilled with WordPress, Riverside, Acast, YouTube, and editing software (iMovie, Final Cut Pro, or Adobe Premiere Pro)

-Experience publishing across multiple platforms with identical show notes

-Understanding of YouTube SEO, monetization rules, and growth tactics

-Ability to repurpose long-form content into engaging short-form videos

-Strong A/V troubleshooting and syncing skills

-Highly organized, deadline-driven, and proactive communicator

-Stable internet and backup connectivity plan



BONUS SKILLS

-Experience with Kajabi or other course platforms

-Experience with ActiveCampaign (to schedule podcast
s)

-Graphic design for thumbnails and social media

-Marketing or ad campaign content creation



WHAT WE EXPECT FROM YOU

Reliability: You meet every deadline

Independence: You follow a documented process without constant oversight

Versatility: You can handle podcasts, YouTube growth, and course/social video editing

Commitment: You see yourself in this role for at least 6–12 months



HOW TO APPLY

-Send ALL of the following in one
 or message — incomplete applications will be ignored:

-A short intro explaining why you’re the best fit

-3+ samples of podcasts you’ve edited (audio + video)

-Links to YouTube channels or videos you’ve managed/edited

-Your hourly rate within $8–$11 USD

-Screenshot of your internet speed test (speedtest.net)

-Confirmation that you are familiar with posting to multiple platforms and keeping them connected for consistent publishing



NOTE: Shortlisted applicants will be given a test project to evaluate quality, speed, and ability to follow instructions.

title: Personal Assistant
description:
Hi there!



I’m an entrepreneur with a lot of big ideas and exciting projects. Things are moving very fast for me right now, and I’ve realized I can’t do it all alone. I’m looking for a friendly, super-smart, and fast-moving Action Partner to help me turn my ideas into reality.



The Vibe:

I’m the "Idea Guy." You are the "Make it Happen" person. I’ll send you the vision (usually via a quick voice note or a short message), and you take the ball and run with it.



What you’ll be doing:



Taking Action: If I have a new service idea, you’ll help me set up the basics to get it running (like simple landing pages or lead lists).

Being Resourceful: If you don't know how to do something, you’re the type of person who loves to watch a quick YouTube video or search Google to figure it out.

Staying Organized: Helping me keep track of the "to-do" list so nothing falls through the cracks.

Simple Tech Stuff: Using tools like social media,
, or AI to help our business grow.

This is for you if:



You love working fast and seeing results.

You are a "self-starter" (you don't need me to watch over your shoulder).

You speak and write great English.

You are a positive person who loves to learn new things.

Why join me?

I’m a very fair person to work for and I treat my team like family. I believe that when I win, you should win too! As we grow and make more money, I love to share that success through bonuses and pay raises.



How to Apply:

I want to keep this simple! Send me a short message and tell me:



A little bit about yourself.

One time you "figured something out" on your own without being told how.

Type the word "READY" at the top of your message so I know you read this whole post.

AND PROVIDE DATE OF BIRTH ON TOP NEXT TO THE WORD "READY" TO AVOID AI COPY AND PASTE APPLICANTS . THANK YOU 

I can't wait to meet you and start building something great!

title: UGC Video Editor For Tiktok and Meta Ads

title: Project Manager / Account Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager / Account Manager



Overview:

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Project Manager / Account Manager to oversee task management, client communication, and team coordination. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, ensures deadlines are met, and maintains strong relationships with both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage and organize projects using ClickUp

Review tasks and assign them based on established SOPs

Audit tasks and outputs using GoHighLevel (GHL) to ensure quality and accuracy

Communicate updates and provide reports to agency owners

Coordinate with agents to ensure timely completion of tickets

Monitor and enforce SLA compliance

Handle client-facing communication when needed

Join client calls to discuss tasks, updates, or concerns



Requirements:



Proven experience with ClickUp or similar project management tools

Strong working knowledge of GoHighLevel (GHL)** for task auditing and quality control

Solid understanding of SOP implementation and workflow management

Excellent communication and reporting skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently

Experience in client-facing roles

Strong coordination and problem-solving skills



Preferred Qualifications:



Background in agency operations or account management

Experience working with remote teams

Familiarity with SLA tracking and performance metrics



What We’re Looking For:



Detail-oriented and highly organized

Proactive communicator

Strong sense of accountability

Ability to work independently and collaboratively



Work Setup:



Remote (not flexible)

Schedule: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST (with 1-hour break)

Full-time: 40hours a week



If you are someone who can keep projects moving, ensure quality delivery, and maintain strong communication across teams and clients, we’d love to hear from you!



Please submit your latest CV and Short introduction about yourself

title: Book Keeper
description:
**Job Title:** Part-Time Bookkeeper for Ecommerce Brand



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented **part-time bookkeeper** to help manage our books for a growing ecommerce business.



This role is currently light, around **1–2 hours per week**, but has room to grow over time.



**Requirements:**



* Fluent in English

* At least **5 years of bookkeeping experience**

* Strong experience with **QuickBooks**

* Comfortable using **Shopify** and pulling reports

* Proficient in **Excel**

* Able to provide a clear **monthly report**

* Organized, accurate, and dependable



**Responsibilities:**



* Maintain and review bookkeeping in QuickBooks

* Pull and review Shopify reports

* Categorize transactions correctly

* Reconcile accounts as needed

* Provide a monthly financial summary

* Flag any issues or discrepancies



Experience with **small business and/or ecommerce bookkeeping** is preferred.



To apply, please send a short introduction, your relevant experience, your hourly rate, and include the word **Maverix** in your application.

title: Architectural Designer
description:
Job Overview

- Job Title: Architectural Designer (Remote)

- Company: Lynear Studio

- Location: San Jose, California, USA

- Work Setup: Remote

- Work Hours: 2:00 pm - 10:30 pm PST Monday-Friday (5:00 am - 1:30 pm PH Time)



About Lynear Studio

- Lynear Studio is a California-based architecture and design practice located in San Jose, California. Our work is focused on residential projects in the U.S., with an emphasis on clear drawings, efficient coordination, and smooth permit application workflows.

- We are looking for a detail-oriented Architectural Designer to join our remote team. This role will mainly support architectural drafting, permit drawing production, and permit application preparation for California-based projects.

- This is a great opportunity for someone who is strong in Revit, understands how U.S. drawing sets are organized, and wants to grow with a fast-paced studio working on real permit projects.



What You’ll Be Doing



*Core Responsibilities for All Candidates:

- Produce and revise architectural drawings in Revit

- Draft plans, elevations, sections, details, and schedules

- Update permit sets based on redlines and internal comments

- Organize drawing sheets, title blocks, and file structures clearly

- Help prepare permit submission packages and supporting documents

- Maintain accuracy, consistency, and clean Revit models

- Communicate clearly in English and meet deadlines reliably

- Work in U.S. imperial units (feet and inches)



*Mid-Level Candidates Should Also Be Able To:

- Produce a permit or construction drawing set with minimal supervision

- Handle redline revisions efficiently and accurately

- Coordinate with structural, civil, Title 24, or other consultants

- Assist with plan check comment responses and drawing updates

- Understand basic U.S. permit workflow and drawing standards



*Senior-Level Candidates Should Also Be Able To:

- Lead drawing production from design development through permit

- Coordinate directly with consultants and support city comment responses

- Review and QC work prepared by junior tea
mbers

- Help maintain office drawing standards, templates, and workflows

- Work more independently and proactively identify issues before they become problems



What We’re Looking For

Strong Revit proficiency - this is required

- Degree in Architecture or related field preferred

- Strong understanding of architectural drafting and drawing organization

- Experience preparing U.S. permit sets or construction documents

- Strong attention to detail and file organization

- Good written and verbal English communication

- Reliable, responsive, and able to work independently

- U.S. experience is a strong plus

- Experience with AutoCAD, or Bluebeam is a plus

- Familiarity with California residential permit work is a plus



What We Offer

- Competitive Salary

- Paid Time Off (PTO)

- Performance-based compensation growth

- Remote work with a U.S.-based architecture studio

- Opportunity to work on real residential and permit projects in California

- Supportive team environment with clear communication

- Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility



How to Apply

To apply, please
 to 

Use this subject line when applying:

- Architectural Designer - Junior/Mid/Senior Level

In the content, please include:

1.Resume

2.Portfolio in PDF format

- The portfolio should include at least 3-5 relevant work samples

- Please include drafting or permit drawing samples if available, not just renderings

3.A short note answering:

- How many years of Revit experience do you have?

- Have you worked on U.S.-based projects before?

- What type of work are you strongest in: drafting, permit sets, coordination, or project support?

- What is your expected hourly rate?

- Are you comfortable working in U.S. imperial units

- Are you comfortable working in the PST (Pacific Standard Time) time zone

title: Marketing, Community & Product Operations Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive Marketing, Community & Product Operations Assistant to support the day-to-day execution behind our online education business.



Our company serves professionals (SLPS, OTs, and PTs) in pediatric feeding and myofunctional therapy through digital education products, trainings, and memberships. This role is a blend of launch support, product maintenance, community organization, backend marketing support, and one-off implementation tasks.



We need someone who enjoys keeping things moving behind the scenes, catching details before they become problems, and helping create a smooth experience for customers, students, and members.



This role is ideal for someone who is comfortable with both recurring operational tasks and one-off support tasks like setting up surveys, organizing assets, checking product uploads, updating pages, and helping execute moving pieces during a launch.



WHAT YOU’LL HELP WITH



1. Launch & Marketing Support



* Support launches, promotions, and offer rollouts

* Help set up and schedule
s in ActiveCampaign

* Assist with links, forms, automations, tags, and backend campaign setup

* Coordinate assets and help make sure moving pieces are completed on time

* Help with launch checklists, QA, and follow-up tasks



2. Product Maintenance & Kajabi Operations



* Upload and organize product content in Kajabi

* Check lessons, downloads, links, offers, checkout pages, and automations

* QA quizzes, surveys, certificates, and
 delivery

* Monitor customer experience details and flag anything broken, missing, or confusing

* Help keep digital products clean, organized, and up to date



3. Community Organization & Member Support



* Help organize community content and resources

* Track member questions, common issues, and follow-up needs

* Support posting, backend organization, and general member experience

* Help ensure members can find what they need and have a smooth experience



4. General Operations & One-Off Support



* Create and manage forms and surveys (such as Typeform)

* Help with recurring admin and backend support tasks

* Assist with one-off implementation tasks as needed

* Organize details, documents, links, and moving pieces across projects

* Follow SOPs, improve checklists, and help keep operations running smoothly



PLATFORMS WE USE

Kajabi, ActiveCampaign, 
, Google Workspace, Canva, Microsoft Office, Zoom, Typeform, and AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude.



REQUIRED SKILLS / EXPERIENCE



* Experience as a VA, online business assistant, marketing assistant, or operations assistant

* Intro-level working knowledge of ActiveCampaign

* Strong working proficiency in Kajabi

* Comfortable working inside 
, Google Workspace, Canva, Microsoft Office, Zoom, and Typeform

* Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude to improve speed, organization, drafting, and workflow support

* Comfortable handling both recurring tasks and one-off implementation requests

* Strong organization and project follow-through

* Excellent attention to detail

* Able to manage multiple moving parts and deadlines

* Strong written communication skills

* Comfortable troubleshooting and learning new systems quickly



NICE TO HAVE



* Experience supporting online courses, memberships, or education brands

* Experience with launch support

* Experience with community support or moderation

* Familiarity with quizzes, certificates, automations, and digital product delivery

**Experience in healthcare education industry 



ROLE TYPE



* Part-time to start

* Remote

* Immediate hire preferred

* Opportunity to grow into a larger operations and launch support role



IMPORTANT NOTE

We have a program launch coming up in the next few weeks, so we’d love to bring someone in now who can shadow and support one launch before taking on greater ownership going into the fall.



HOW TO APPLY

Please include the following in your application:



Send ALL of the following in one  message — incomplete applications will be ignored:



* A short loom introducing yourself and explaining why you are the best fit 

* Please include your resume and at least two professional references

* Include your experience with Kajabi, ActiveCampaign, Typeform, 
 etc 

* Examples of launch support, product maintenance, or backend support work you’ve done

* Your availability and hourly rate

* A short paragraph explaining your understanding of what our business does and who we serve

* A short note on how you’ve used ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools in your work

*Screenshot of your internet speed test (speedtest.net)

*Confirm you're able to work US based hours 

* The word “feeding” somewhere in your application so we know you read the full post

title: Full-Charge Bookkeeper / Payroll & HR Specialist

title: Creative Strategist + Designer (A-Player Only | Performance-Based Upside)
description:
Creative Strategist + Designer (A-Player Only | Performance-Based Upside)

About the Role



We are looking for a true A-player Creative Strategist who can also execute — someone who doesn’t just come up with ideas, but actually builds high-performing creatives that scale.



This is not a beginner or mid-level role.

We are only interested in people who have already operated at a high level inside brands doing $500k+ per month.



What You’ll Be Doing

Develop and execute winning creative strategies for paid ads

Create high-converting ad creatives (UGC, statics, video concepts)

Analyze performance and iterate fast based on data

Identify winning angles and scale them aggressively

Leverage modern AI-driven workflows to speed up and enhance creative production

Work closely with the team to push creatives that actually drive revenue

Who We’re Looking For

You have worked as a Creative Strategist for brands doing $500k+ monthly revenue

You understand what makes creatives scale (not just look good)

You can both strategize AND design/execute

You are comfortable using AI to create, test, and iterate creatives efficiently

You think in terms of performance, hooks, angles, and iterations

You move fast and take ownership

Compensation (High Upside ????)



We don’t just pay for work — we reward performance.



???? If your creatives perform and scale, you will earn a percentage of the ad spend generated by your winning creatives.



This means:

As you scale our brand, you scale your own income.



How to Apply



Send:



Your CV

At least 2 brands you’ve worked with where you handled creative strategy for brands doing $500k+ monthly revenue

Examples of creatives you’ve personally created and scaled



If you haven’t operated at this level before, this role is not for you.

title: Marketing Specialist ( Swiss Army Knife for Marketing)
description:
We’re Hiring: Marketing Operator (Full-Stack / “Swiss Army Knife”)



We’re looking for a high-agency Marketing Operator who can own and execute across multiple channels. This isn’t a narrow role — it’s for someone who thrives wearing many hats and turning ideas into real growth.



If you’re the kind of person who can jump from content ? ads ? SEO ? analytics ? creative, keep reading.



???? What You’ll Do



You’ll be responsible for end-to-end marketing execution, including:



???? Social Media Marketing (SMM)

Plan, create, and publish content across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, X, LinkedIn, etc.)

???? Paid Ads (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)

Launch, test, and optimize campaigns for performance

???? SEO & Content

Keyword research, on-page optimization, and content strategy

???? Video Editing (Short-form)

Create/edit reels, TikToks, and ad creatives (fast, engaging, scroll-stopping)

?? Copywriting

Write compelling captions, ad copy, landing pages, and hooks

???? Analytics & Optimization

Track performance, run experiments, and continuously improve results

????? You Might Be a Fit If You:

Are a generalist who can execute, not just strategize

Have experience across multiple marketing channels (not just one)

Are comfortable with tools like:

Meta Ads Manager / Google Ads

Canva / CapCut / Premiere / After Effects (any editing tool)

SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, etc.)

Have a strong sense of what works creatively (especially short-form content)

Move fast, test often, and figure things out without hand-holding

? Bonus Points

Experience in startups or fast-paced environments

Basic design skills

Understanding of funnels / conversion optimization

Ability to spot trends early and act on them quickly

???? What You’ll Get

High ownership and autonomy

Room to experiment and actually ship ideas

A fast-moving team that values execution over meetings

Opportunity to directly impact growth

???? How to Apply



Send us:



A short intro about yourself

Examples of your work (ads, content, campaigns, etc.)

Anything you’ve built, grown, or improved



If you’re a marketing Swiss army knife who loves building and shipping, we want to hear from you.

title: SALES COPYWRITER ($700 p.m. base salary)
description:
As a copywriter, you are responsible for setting up salespersons success by providing the necessary structure and sales funnel they will be working within.

Your role involves making sales both scalable and personalized for every client while also developing compelling offers that salespersons can effectively sell.



This job is 50% creative and 50?ministrative work.

This job is 85% solo work and 15% team-work with daily team communication



Tasks & Responsibilities

- Creating Offers (Content + Copy)

- Inputting all your work in our AirTable Database to track and analyze your results

- Tasks such as message creation, scheduling, tracking and evaluating





What are are looking for:

- Previous experience in Jobs that require Creativity

- Organizational skills

- Persuasive Messaging

- Storytelling Strategy

- good in single-tasking



Job Info:

- 6d a week, 8h/day, 1 fix off

- position to promote to a Leader position



We only read applications who have "i am creative" in their subject to filter out copy paste applications.



When you apply, add your CV and convince us in one sentence, why we should hire you over 200+ other applicants.

title: Remote Graphic Designer & Video Editor (AI Video Experience Required)
description:
**Job Title:** Remote Graphic Designer / Video Editor (AI Video Experience Required)



**Location:** Remote

**Schedule:** Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (US Pacific Standard Time)



**About the Role**

We are looking for a talented **Graphic Designer / Video Editor** to join our team in a fully remote role. This position focuses on creating engaging visual content for an established e-commerce business, including product graphics, marketing creatives, and promotional videos. A key part of this role involves producing **AI-generated videos** for marketing and promotional use.



**Responsibilities**



* Design marketing graphics for website banners,
 campaigns, ads, and social media.

* Edit and produce promotional and product videos.

* Create **AI-generated videos** for product promotions and marketing campaigns.

* Develop visually appealing content that aligns with the brand’s style and messaging.

* Collaborate with the marketing team to produce high-quality visual assets.

* Optimize images and videos for different platforms (website, advertising, and social media).



**Required Skills**



* Strong proficiency in **Adobe Creative Suite** (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

* Experience using other **graphic design and video editing software**.

* **Proven experience creating AI-generated videos** (this is a critical requirement).

* Strong understanding of modern design trends and video storytelling.

* **Excellent English communication skills** (written and spoken).

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote work environment.



**Work Schedule**



* Monday to Friday

* **9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (US Pacific Standard Time)**

  Applicants must be able to consistently work during these hours.



**How to Apply (Important – Please Read Carefully)**

To be considered for this position, **you must include BOTH of the following**:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short video recording of yourself** explaining:



   * Your graphic design and video editing experience

   * Your experience creating **AI-generated videos**

   * The tools and software you regularly use



**Applications that do not include both the resume and the video introduction will not be considered.**



Please make sure you follow these instructions carefully when applying.

title: Video Editor
description:
About Inumin Media

Inumin Media is a boutique digital marketing agency based in Canada. We specialize in high-impact social media, web design, and paid advertising, helping purpose-driven brands tell their stories through cinematic, engaging content.



We are looking for a creative, detail-oriented Video Editor & Content Creator to help us elevate our production. If you have a sharp eye for pacing, visual trends, and narrative storytelling, you’ll fit right in.



The Essentials

Location: Remote



Working Hours: Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (Mountain Time). This window is non-negotiable for team synchronization.



Compensation: Starting at $5.00 USD/hour (Project-based).



Key Responsibilities

Visual Design: Craft high-converting graphics and carousels using Canva.



Video Production: Edit high-energy short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) using Adobe Premiere Pro or similar professional software.



Post-Production: Masterfully integrate captions, trending music, SFX, and clean animations.



Collaboration: Work closely with our creative team and occasionally coordinate with clients to secure assets or finalize revisions.



Technical & Professional Requirements

Software: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or equivalent professional editing suites.



Hardware: A workstation capable of processing 4K video files without lag.



Connectivity: Reliable, high-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum).



AI Savvy: Comfortable leveraging AI tools (ChatGPT, Descript, etc.) to streamline ideation and workflow.



Experience: Minimum 1 year of video editing experience.



Communication: Strong English proficiency (written and verbal) with an ability to follow complex creative briefs.



Nice to Have:

Experience within a marketing agency environment.

Familiarity with Slack, Asana, and Google Workspace.



How to Apply

We value attention to detail. To be considered, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line/Start of Message: Use the phrase “Video Editor for Inumin”.

Proof of Tech: Attach screenshots of your Internet Speed Test and your PC Specifications.

Your Background: Attach an updated CV.

Portfolio: Share direct links to your best Canva designs and short-form video edits.



The "Why": In 2–3 sentences, tell us why your editing style is the right match for a cinematic boutique agency.



Note: We only review applications that follow all instructions. Incomplete submissions will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant / Personal Assistant
description:

Personal Logistics

Communication &
 Management

Monitor and organize
 inbox

Administrative Support

Qualifications

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Strong communication and follow-up skills

Experience with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail)

title: Data Engineer
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a hands-on Data Engineer to own our data pipelines end-to-end. You’ll turn raw operational data into clean, reliable datasets that power business decisions in a fast-paced startup environment.

This role gives you real ownership, the chance to see your impact daily, and plenty of room to grow.



What You’ll Do

Build, maintain, and scale data pipelines (ETL/ELT) from our core systems

Clean, standardize, and model data so teams across the company can easily analyze and use it

Improve data quality, reliability, and documentation as we grow

Collaborate with engineering, operations, and stakeholders to ship solutions quickly

Apply solid data practices (version control, testing, and organization) while delivering real value



Requirements

2–6 years of experience in data engineering, ETL/ELT, analytics engineering, or a similar role (strong recent grads or bootcamp grads with solid projects are welcome)

Strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python (or similar scripting)

Experience with data transformation tools (dbt is a big plus)

Solid problem-solving skills and high attention to detail

Excited to work in a dynamic startup where you’ll wear multiple hats

Good communicator who enjoys collaborating with both technical and non-technical teammates



Nice to Have

Experience with dbt, Airflow, or similar data tools

Background in operations, logistics, supply chain, or hardware/device industries

Familiarity with software engineering practices applied to data (Git, testing, environments)

Passion for building clean, trustworthy data that the business actually uses



Requirements:

- English fluency

- Working US time-zone hours

- Full-time (8hours)

title: Need Instagram Automation Expert
description:
I run mass follow/unfollow campaigns and use automation to grow Instagram accounts. My main issue right now is getting new accounts warmed up properly without triggering bans or action blocks.



I need someone who understands Instagram’s trust and safety algorithms and can help me:



Warm up new or aged accounts safely (manual or semi-automated behavior)

Reduce the risk of phone/email verification loops and bans

Set up proper session timing, activity patterns, and proxy/dedicated IP testing

Possibly help troubleshoot why accounts are getting flagged (shadowbans, “action blocked,” etc.)

Provide daily check-ins on account health for a set number of accounts

Experience required:

You don’t need to be a developer, but you must have hands-on experience with Instagram automation, warming strategies, and avoiding bans.



Payment:



$5 USD/hour to start (training + testing phase)

After 2 weeks, increase to $6–$10/hour depending on performance and reduction in bans

Hours: Flexible, 10–20 hours/week to start, potentially more.



To apply:

Tell me about your experience with Instagram account warming and which methods have worked best for you. Also, let me know your availability.

title: Wix Studio Technical SEO & Velo Developer
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for an experienced Wix Studio developer who can support a fast-growing directory and content platform. This role requires someone who is strong in both front-end implementation and technical setup, with proven experience in Wix Studio, Velo, technical SEO, structured data, and payment or gated-access functionality.



This is not a basic design-only role. We need someone who can think strategically, solve technical problems independently, and communicate clearly on progress, blockers, and next steps.



**What We Need Help With**



* Building and improving pages in Wix Studio

* Working with Wix CMS collections, dynamic pages, and datasets

* Implementing technical SEO best practices across content and directory pages

* Adding and troubleshooting JSON-LD schema markup

* Setting up structured data such as FAQ, Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, Article, and other relevant schema types

* Creating clean URL structures and improving internal linking setup

* Troubleshooting indexing, metadata, page structure, and on-page SEO issues

* Building paid listing, claim listing, or gated-access workflows

* Setting up payment flows for pages, subscriptions, pricing plans, or member-access pages

* Working with Wix Members Area, Pricing Plans, and paid access restrictions

* Creating custom functionality in Velo when native Wix functionality is not enough

* Connecting forms, buttons, and member actions to CMS collections

* Helping create scalable workflows for business owners to claim, pay for, and manage listings



**Required Skills**



* Strong hands-on experience with Wix Studio

* Strong experience with Velo by Wix

* Strong understanding of Wix CMS, dynamic pages, and dataset permissions

* Solid technical SEO knowledge

* Experience implementing and validating JSON-LD schema

* Understanding of page indexing, structured data, metadata, canonical issues, redirects, and internal linking

* Experience building payment-related flows inside Wix, including Pricing Plans, gated pages, paid member access, or listing claim systems

* Ability to troubleshoot custom logic involving logged-in members, CMS records, and permissions

* Strong written communication and daily status reporting



**Nice to Have**



* Experience with directory-style websites

* Experience building claim-a-listing workflows

* Experience with attorney, local service, employer, or resource directories

* Familiarity with Google Search Console and SEO QA

* Experience improving site architecture for large content sites



**What Success Looks Like**



* Pages are built correctly and function properly

* JSON/schema is implemented accurately and without errors

* Technical SEO issues are identified and fixed proactively

* Payment and claim workflows work cleanly

* CMS and member permissions are set up correctly

* Communication is consistent, direct, and reliable

* Clear daily updates are provided with completed work, blockers, and next steps



**Communication Expectations**



* Daily end-of-day status updates are required

* Must communicate blockers clearly and early

* Must respond directly to project-related questions within a reasonable timeframe during working hours

* Must be comfortable documenting work and providing handoff notes when needed



**To Apply, Please Include**



1. Examples of Wix Studio sites you have built

2. Examples of technical SEO work you have completed

3. Examples of JSON-LD/schema you have implemented

4. A description of any Wix payment, pricing plan, gated-access, or claim-listing workflows you have built

5. Confirmation that you are comfortable with daily updates and written documentation

6. Your availability and hourly or project rate



**Screening Questions**



1. Have you built in Wix Studio using Velo and CMS dynamic pages?

2. Have you implemented JSON-LD schema manually in Wix?

3. Have you set up Pricing Plans, gated pages, or paid access in Wix?

4. Have you connected logged-in members to CMS-based workflows?

5. How would you approach a “claim this listing” feature for existing directory pages?

6. What technical SEO tasks inside Wix are you strongest at?

7. Can you provide daily end-of-day updates?
