Storytelling and narrative structure

YouTube script writing (preferred)

Documentary-style or educational content



Application Requirements



Please include:



Samples of your writing (VERY IMPORTANT)

Must be long-form (not short posts)

YouTube scripts preferred

Google Docs or similar format preferred

If you don’t have YouTube scripts:

Share your closest long-form storytelling work



TEST PROJECT (IMPORTANT)



If you pass the initial screening, we will ask you to complete a short test project.



This is how we evaluate:



writing quality

structure

flow

attention to detail

title: 3D Motion Graphics Designer - Social Media & YouTube Content (Cinema 4D / Blender + After Effects)
description:
We are a growing social media content agency producing weekly Reels, TikToks, animated posts, and YouTube videos for clients across various industries. We are actively expanding our client base and building a reliable creative team.

 

We are looking for a skilled 3D Motion Graphics Designer to join us long-term as a dedicated freelancer. This is NOT a one-time project — we need someone who can grow with us from part-time to full-time as we sign more clients.

 

 

WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 

- Create 3D animated Reels and short-form videos (30 seconds to 1.5 minutes) with high-quality 3D motion graphics for Instagram, TikTok, and

- Produce 3D motion graphics for longer YouTube videos (5 to 30+ minutes) including 3D intros, 3D transitions, animated sequences, and 3D visual storytelling elements

- Produce 3D product renders, 3D text, 3D scenes, and 3D animated elements for social media content

- Create animated posts with 3D motion elements (carousels, stories, static with 3D animation)

- Combine 3D elements with 2D compositing in After Effects for polished final deliverables

- Model, light, texture, and animate 3D objects and scenes

- Follow brand guidelines and maintain visual consistency across all deliverables

- Deliver platform-ready files optimized for Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube (9:16, 1:1, 4:5, 16:9)

- Work volume will increase as we onboard new clients — we want someone ready to scale with us

 

 

REQUIRED SKILLS (non-negotiable):

 

- Cinema 4D and/or Blender — you MUST be highly proficient in at least one 3D software

- Adobe After Effects — for compositing, 2D motion elements, and final polish

- Adobe Premiere Pro — for video editing, assembly, and final export

- Strong 3D skills: modeling, lighting, texturing, rendering, and animation

- Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in 3D motion graphics

- Strong understanding of social media content — you know what grabs attention

- Clean animation principles: proper easing, timing, camera movements, and visual impact

- Ability to deliver within 48-72 hour turnaround per piece

- Reliable internet connection and responsive communication

 

 

NICE TO HAVE:

 

- Octane Render, Redshift, or other GPU renderers for faster, higher-quality output

- Experience with 3D product visualization and product animation

- Experience with YouTube content (3D intros, outros, animated overlays)

- Experience producing content for brands or agencies

- Understanding of current social media trends and formats

- Ability to manage multiple client projects at the same time

 

 

DO NOT APPLY IF:

 

- You do not know Cinema 4D or Blender — this is a 3D-focused role

- You only do 3D modeling without animation — we need motion, not still renders

- You have less than 2 years of 3D motion graphics experience

- You cannot provide a showreel or portfolio with real 3D project examples

- You are looking for a one-time gig — this is a long-term position

 

 

HOW TO APPLY — PLEASE READ CAREFULLY:

 

Your application MUST include all 4 of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed:

 

1. A link to your showreel or portfolio (Vimeo, Google Drive, Behance, or personal website) showing your best 3D motion graphics work — we want to see modeling, animation, lighting, and rendering quality

2. At least 3 examples of 3D content you have created (3D Reels, 3D product animations, 3D social media content, or 3D YouTube intros)

3. Your hourly rate in USD

4. A short message (2-3 sentences maximum) telling us what 3D software you use and what makes you stand out

 

To increase your chances of being selected, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a brief test based on a real client brief. This is your opportunity to show us your 3D skills, speed, and creative thinking in a real working scenario.

 

We pay weekly. No delays, no excuses — you deliver quality work, you get paid on time, every week.

 

We are building something long-term and we want the right person by our side. If you are consistent, reliable, and passionate about 3D motion design, we want to hear from you.

title: Sales & Engagement VA for Online Education Business (Setter + Social Media + Tracking)
description:
About Us

We run a 12-week online program that helps educators and education professionals build profitable teaching businesses without quitting their jobs. We work with passionate, mission-driven educators who are tired of salary caps and institutional red tape. They want to own their expertise and build income on their terms. We're growing fast and need a sharp, sales-minded VA to help us scale.



What You'll Do

Your primary job is to move conversations toward enrollment.

You'll be the first voice prospects hear from us. You'll engage with cold and warm leads on social media, respond to DMs, qualify interest, book discovery calls for our co-founder, and track everything so nothing falls through the cracks.

This role requires flexibility and eagerness to learn. You'll need to step in and be trained on whatever the business needs as we grow — whether that's refining DM scripts, testing new outreach strategies, or supporting other areas of the business. We're looking for someone who sees this as an opportunity to grow with us, not just complete tasks.

Daily Responsibilities:

DM Management & Lead Engagement



Monitor and respond to messages across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and TikTok

Use our proven scripts to move cold and warm leads toward discovery calls

Follow up consistently with prospects using our outreach sequences

Identify high-intent prospects and book calls with our closer



Lead Qualification



Ask qualifying questions before booking calls (current role, pain points, timeline)

Flag hot leads to prioritize

Politely redirect poor-fit prospects



Call Booking & Coordination



Send Calendly links to qualified leads

Confirm calls 24 hours in advance and send reminders

Update tracker with call outcomes (showed / no-showed / rescheduled / closed)



Tracking & Reporting



Update DM tracker daily (who was contacted, responses, next steps)

Update sales tracker after each discovery call

Provide weekly reports on activity and results



Light Social Media Engagement (As needed)



Like and comment on posts from warm leads

Respond to story replies and engagement

Maintain a warm, relational presence online





Who You Are

Must-Haves:



? Sales experience — You've done appointment-setting, lead generation, or sales support before. You understand how to move conversations toward a goal.

? Amazing conversational English — You write like a real person, not a robot. Your grammar is flawless and your tone is warm and natural.

? Admin skills — You're organized, detail-oriented, and can manage multiple conversations and tracking systems without dropping the ball.

? Eager learner — You're excited to be trained on new systems, tools, and strategies. You don't just want to complete tasks — you want to understand the business and grow with it.

? Cultural fit — You're proactive, positive, and collaborative. You bring solutions, not just problems. You communicate clearly and take ownership of your work.



Strong Pluses:



???? Previous experience in education, coaching, or course-creator industries

???? Experience with CRM systems or pipeline management tools

???? Comfortable working with U.S.-based clients in similar time zones



Personality Fit:



Relational and warm — You genuinely enjoy connecting with people. Our audience is educators — they can spot inauthenticity immediately.

Results-driven — You're energized by hitting goals and seeing conversations turn into booked calls and closed sales.

Comfortable with sales — You don't shy away from asking for the call. You see it as helping, not pushing.

Fast-moving and adaptable — You're comfortable with change and evolving systems. You don't need everything to be perfect before you act.

Proactive and enthusiastic — You see what needs to happen and make it happen without being told.

Coachable — You take feedback well and improve quickly.





Compensation & Hours

Starting Rate: $4.00/hour

Hours: 20–25 hours per week to start (potential to grow to 30–40 hours based on performance and business needs)

Commission: $125 per closed sale (begins after your first month of employment)

Payment: Weekly via PayPal, Wise, or your preferred method

How Earnings Work:

Month 1 (Training Period):



You'll earn your base hourly rate while you learn our systems, scripts, and processes

No commission during Month 1 — this is your ramp-up period



Month 2 and Beyond:



Base pay continues at $4/hour

You earn $125 commission for every prospect you engage with who enrolls in our program

Commission is paid weekly along with your base pay



Commission Eligibility: You earn commission when a prospect you directly engaged with (via DM, follow-up, or booking coordination) enrolls in our program. We track this through our DM and sales trackers, so you'll always know which leads are yours.

Example Monthly Earnings (After Month 1):



Base (25 hours/week × 4 weeks × $4/hour): $400/month

Commission (3 closed sales/month × $125): +$375/month

Total potential: $775+/month



High Performer Example:



Base: $400/month

Commission (5 closed sales/month × $125): +$625/month

Total: $1,025+/month



As you prove yourself and take on more responsibility, we're open to raising your base rate and increasing commission structure.



Work Schedule & Availability

Required Working Hours:

We need someone available during U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, specifically:



Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (at least partial overlap required)

Some flexibility required for evening coverage (7:00–9:00 PM CST) 2–3 nights per week when discovery calls happen



You don't need to work all those hours, but you need to be responsive during those windows.

Start Date: As soon as possible (we're ready to onboard the right person immediately)



How to Apply

IMPORTANT: Applications missing ANY of these requirements will be deleted without review.

To apply, you MUST:

1. Use exactly 9 Application Points (AP) when submitting your application through OnlineJobs.ph

2. Use this exact
 subject line:

"Sales VA – [Your First Name] – 9 AP"

3. Submit a short video no more than 2-minutes on Loom, unlisted YouTube, or another platform where you:



Introduce yourself

Explain why you're interested in a sales/setter role (not just general VA work)

Confirm your internet speed and availability during CST hours



4. Include in your application message on OnlineJobs.ph:



Your resume (attach as PDF)

Link to your Loom/YouTube intro video

Your specific availability (which hours you can work in CST, Monday–Friday)

Confirm you used exactly 9 Application Points





Application Checklist (Check These Off Before Submitting):



 I used exactly 9 Application Points when applying

 My subject line is: "Sales VA – [My First Name] – 9 AP"

 I included a short intro video less than 2 minutes (Loom, YouTube, or other medium)

 I attached my resume as a PDF

 I confirmed my internet speed and CST availability in my video

 I stated my specific availability hours in my application



Applications that don't follow these instructions exactly will be deleted without review.

This is your first test of attention to detail — the same skill you'll need every day in this role.



Why Work With Us?

? Meaningful mission — You're helping educators take control of their income and build businesses they own

? Growth opportunity — We're scaling fast. Prove yourself and this role can grow with you (more hours, higher pay, expanded responsibilities)

? Direct mentorship — You'll work closely with experienced business builders

? Performance-based rewards — We reward results, not just hours logged

? Supportive, collaborative team — We value proactive communication, ownership, and getting better every week

? Fast-moving environment — We're building in real-time. You'll see the direct impact of your work immediately



We're looking for an eager learner with sales experience, exceptional English skills, and the right cultural fit — someone who sees this as more than just "a VA job."

If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant (Outreach, Deal Sourcing & Admin Support)
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant (Outreach, Deal Sourcing & Admin Support)

Job Type: Remote | Full-Time / Part-Time



Overview

Secret word is "pineapple"

We are an embroidery and custom apparel shop in the U.S. We have a team already, and you'd be the newest addition. Your job is to service inbound warm leads looking for apparel that we will design for them (think hats, shirts, etc.).



You get to know the needs of the customer, get their requirements, and work with our design team to make mockups and make the sale. You then follow up and nurture leads effectively until you make the sale.

title: Admin to the Chief Marketing Officer
description:
Join Our Value-Centered Team: Where Passion Meets Purpose!



Application Process:

1.

You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history.  Include all compensation for every job, project, etc. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.

2.

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified. Be honest, don’t give us nice to hear words.

3. IMPORTANT: Please
 the above two items to 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic termination for further interview process.



Company: Achieve Integrative Health, No. 1 Acupuncture Clinic in Cedar Park and Austin surrounding areas

Website: 
/



About the Company:

Join Achieve Integrative Health, Austin, TX's premier acupuncture clinic, and be part of a transformative healthcare journey. For over 18 years, we've championed health restoration, empowering thousands to reclaim their energy, vitality, and joy. Our success stems from a unique blend of Traditional Chinese Medicine and advanced technologies.



At Achieve Integrative Health, we're not just about healthcare; we're about life-changing care. Join us to deliver unparalleled service and results, reshaping healthcare one patient at a time. Let's make lives great again, together!



Let's build the future together! Your skills, combined with our vision and aligned with our values, will pave the path for a brighter tomorrow.



Why Join Us?

• Transform Lives: We're not just another company. At Achieve Integrative Health, WE MAKE a real difference by bringing joy and health back into lives with every interaction.

• Unbounded Growth: There is no limit to your growth with our company. We're on a mission to grow, with plans to expand our healing touch in Austin, Texas and its surrounding areas.

• Empowerment Team Culture: We are known for our team culture because we make it our mission to help our tea
mbers achieve their professional, financial, and personal goals. 



We're Seeking Individuals Who Are Aligned with Our Core Values...

• Service Above Self: You have a CARING heart and a HUMBLE attitude to put patients’ needs before yours.

• Commitment: You are persistent and disciplined in reaching your OWN goals that are demonstrated by your consistent performance and growth.

• Accountable: No excuses allowed. You are responsible for everything that happens to you and everything that doesn’t happen to you. You are responsible for everything that you have and everything that you don’t have.

• Results Oriented: While we acknowledge your effort, you are only rewarded when producing results that are measured via the statistics for your positions and for the company.

• Transparency: You maintain and practice clear, honest, and direct communication about your thoughts and intentions with every tea
mber and every patient.

• Inspirational: You lead by example to inspire our patients to live a healthy lifestyle by living a healthy lifestyle yourself and you lead by example to inspire each tea
mber by constantly striving to reach your own potential.



WHAT WE OFFER:

• Competitive total Compensation: Base salary + performance bonuses in the acupuncture industry that rewards you based on the RESULTS you produce. If you are looking for a guaranteed salary w/o being accountable to meeting KPIs, this is not the team for you.

* A team and environment that is collaborative, accountable, caring, supportive, honest, transparent, as we remove all employees who talk behind peoples back and lack integrity

• Learning & Growth Opportunities: Access a wealth of resources to keep sharpening your mindset, communication, and customer service skills.

• Wellness Initiatives: Benefit from complimentary virtual health services, ensuring your well-being is always a priority.

• Work from Home: Be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work.

• Other Benefits: Paid-Time off and medical insurance for qualified tea
mbers after successfully completing the 90-day training period.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

* assist the Chief Marketing Officer in reviewing
s, marketing material, uploading videos onto social media

* use Editing Apps that integrate AI (ie. CapCut, Canva, ChatGPT) to generate thumbnails, images, reels

* organize all of our marketing tasks and make sure all tasks are executed in a timely manner w/ excellence

* respond to social media comments

* create newsletters

* track All marketing stats

* Transcribe videos into
s and blogs

* vitally important = be able to follow the CMO's instructions

* and additional admin tasks



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.



Computer/Laptop/Internet Requirements:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 10 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet

• Intel Core i5 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam

• Quiet, private home office free from noise background or distractions



WORK HOURS

* Option Full-time =  40 hours per week, work schedule is based on your time zone and must be consistent work hours, you cannot work whenever you want.

* Option PART-TIME = Part-time 20 hours/wk, in your timezone, but assignments/projects/tasks must be completed by 6am CST everyday M-F 

* BOTH must attend our morning marketing huddle mon-fri 8:09am CST - 8:45am cst





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS:

* be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work

* monthly salary for full-time

* pay is based on your ability to produce measurable results and not experience

* the more Qualified Leads you help our clinic generate the higher your compensation

* we offer lucrative performance based bonuses that are paid monthly

* Paid Time Off, Paid Holidays for qualified tea
mbers

* Medical Insurance for qualified tea
mbers

* The biggest Benefit of joining our team is we help our tea
mbers achieve their Personal, Professional and Financial Goals. When was the last time you joined a company that invested resources to help you achieve YOUR professional, financial and personal goals? We could be your first.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Brand Builder with Social Media Expertise
description:
High growth potential long-term opportunity



GoonieLife is looking for  VA + Social Media Content Creator to help build a freedom-focused brand around vanlife/RV life, lifestyle consulting, and future investor opportunities . The role will start at 10–20 hours per week and can grow into a long-term position for the right person.





This position is focused on creating and editing content that drives real audience engagement and eventually helps build an
 list for future investor opportunities . Short-form content and creator support are common core functions for social media content creator roles, and Philippine freelancer marketplaces prominently feature this skill set.What this person will do



Edit raw clips, photos, and voice notes into short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



Create simple graphics, thumbnails, and social assets in Canva or similar tools.



Write captions, hooks, and calls to action in strong conversational English.



Help organize a simple weekly content plan around vanlife/RV life, lifestyle consulting, and future investor-list growth.



Track content performance with an emphasis on meaningful engagement rather than vanity metrics.



What matters most

This role is not just about posting content. It is about creating content that gets real user interaction such as saves, shares, quality comments, profile visits, and link clicks rather than empty vanity numbers.

The
-list side of the role is expected to begin in roughly three months , once the lead funnel and signup flow are active. After that point, bonuses will also be tied to real
 subscribers generated from social content.

Pay and upside

Hours: 10–20 hours per week to start.



Base pay: $5–$10 USD per hour , depending on experience and fit.



Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses tied to meaningful engagement and audience interaction, with
 signup incentives planned later as the funnel launches.



Growth path: This can become a long-term role with more hours, more responsibility, and higher earning potential for someone who is focused and produces results.



Ideal candidate

The best fit is someone in the Philippines with experience supporting English-speaking clients and strong skills in short-form editing, Canva, organization, and social media execution. Philippine hiring listings and freelancer directories commonly highlight those exact capabilities for social media creator roles.

Bonus points if the candidate naturally connects with topics like vanlife, RV life, travel, freedom-based living, business, or investing.

How to apply

Please send:

A short introduction about yourself.



Links to 3–5 short-form videos you have edited.



Examples of pages or brands you have supported.



Your hourly rate in USD.



Your available weekly hours.



A short note about why this role interests you.





This is a serious growth opportunity for someone who wants to build with a brand over time and be rewarded for performance.

title: Commission Inquiry Coordinator
description:
JOB TITLE: Commission Inquiry Coordinator

REPORTS TO: Director, Revenue Operations



The Commission Inquiry Coordinator plays a critical support role on the Revenue Assurance team, ensuring that open commission inquiries are actively monitored, accurately documented, and promptly communicated. This role is ideal for a highly organized, detail-oriented individual who thrives on process and consistency. By owning the operational upkeep of inquiry tickets, the Coordinator frees the commissions analyst team to focus on high-value analytical and partner-facing work.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES (PH-tailored)



-Monitor the commissions inquiry inbox on a set cadence aligned to US business hours (night shift PH time), triaging updates from distributors (TSDs) and suppliers per SOP.

-Log and update partner-facing tickets in the internal CRM/ticketing tool (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot) with clear notes, correct statuses, and time stamps to meet SLAs.

-Check TSD and supplier portals bi-weekly (or as required), capture evidence (screenshots/files), and document findings in the ticket and tracker.

-Send timely follow-ups to TSDs and suppliers on overdue inquiries; escalate per escalation matrix when response SLAs are missed.

-Recognize issues needing analytical review or partner communication and hand off to the assigned commissions analyst with complete context and attachments.

-Maintain audit-ready records and data integrity across ticketing, spreadsheets, and commission systems; manage file versions in Google Drive/SharePoint.

-Assist with shared inbox management (labels, rules, routing) to direct inquiries to the correct analyst or queue and flag urgent items.

-Prepare and maintain trackers and weekly status reports (volume, aging, response times, resolutions) for the Revenue Operations team.

-Support month-end/quarter-end activities, including bulk ticket updates, portal sweeps, and meeting cut-off timelines.

-Contribute to process documentation and continuous improvement; update SOPs/checklists when changes are implemented.

-Ensure compliance with data privacy and confidentiality requirements (company policies, GDPR/CCPA where applicable).

-Provide clear end-of-shift handovers to ensure continuity between PH and US teams.



QUALIFICATIONS :



-Bachelor’s degree preferred; alternatively, 2+ years of BPO/back-office or
 support experience in operations, billing, finance ops, order management, or similar.

-Strong attention to detail and data accuracy; proven track record handling high-volume, repetitive tasks with minimal errors.

-Excellent written and professional English; comfortable communicating with US-based stakeholders and external vendors.

-Proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel (filters, lookups/VLOOKUP or XLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting, data validation).

-Experience with ticketing/CRM systems (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot); Jira or ServiceNow is a plus.

-Ability to follow defined SOPs, meet SLAs, and appropriately flag exceptions/escalations.

-Comfortable working across multiple systems and supplier portals simultaneously; fast learner with strong keyboard skills (e.g., 45+ WPM with high accuracy).

-Strong organizational and time-management skills; skilled in maintaining trackers and clear documentation.

-Willing and able to work night shifts aligned to US time zones, including select Philippine holidays and month-end/quarter-end overtime when needed.

-Reliable remote setup (e.g., at least 25 Mbps internet, backup connectivity/power, quiet workspace); or openness to onsite/hybrid as required by the company.

-Familiarity with handling sensitive financial or commission data and adherence to confidentiality/data privacy policies.

-Nice to have: experience in telecom or IT channel environments, revenue assurance, commissions or billing support, and vendor/partner communications.



If you feel you meet the qualifications above, please send your resume to 
 with a cover letter stating why you are the best candidate. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. We will ONLY reach out to qualified candidates. Thank you.

title: Social Media Growth Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: You must reply to each of our 4 questions to be considered.



Also, your application MUST include a direct link to ONE YouTube channel you personally managed. Include the subscriber count when you started and what you grew it to.



Applications without this specific link and these specific numbers will be deleted.



We’ve received many AI-generated replies that copy our job description back to us. Those get deleted immediately. If that's the kind of effort you put into a reply to a long-term position, then that's the effort we assume you would put into the job.



We’re hiring a social media manager, not an agency and not a general VA.



How to apply:



In your response, include:

1. A link to at least one YouTube channel you personally grew, with the subscriber count when you started vs. now

2. Links to any TikTok or Instagram accounts you grew, with follower counts before and after your involvement

3. How you personally grow these channels, your actual strategy, not a list of buzzwords

4. Confirmation that you handle video editing and posting yourself



This job is NOT for you if:

- Your only experience is on smaller YT accounts with less than 25K subscribers, IG accounts with less than 25K followers, or TT accounts with less than 100K followers

- You’re not a geek about algorithms and performance metrics

- You rely on scheduling tools as a growth strategy

- You cannot provide links to specific accounts you’ve grown



This job IS for you if you can:

- Take our raw video content and edit it for YouTube, long-form and Shorts, Instagram, and TikTok

- Edit, post, and optimize for channel growth

- Stay current on platform algorithms and growth strategies

- Be proactive with studying and testing hooks, pacing, captions, and formats

- Maintain strict brand consistency in messaging, tone, colors, and wording

- Meet weekly with the content host



Core responsibilities:



Research: Study top-performing creators and content in our niche. Track what is working and why.



Script Support: Help determine the best marketing hooks and topics based on your research in our industry.



Edit and Upload: Edit videos and publish content across all platforms to maximize reach, retention, and growth.



Requirements:

- 1+ years hands-on experience growing video-based social accounts

- Proven understanding of YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok algorithms

- Strong video editing skills focused on hooks and retention

- Fluent English

- Available during EST hours



This is a secure, long-term role for the right person.

title: Residential Architect
description:
Position: Residential Architect - Philippines

Reports to: Director of Design

Schedule:

JRH Engineering & Environmental Services Inc. is headquartered in Houston, TX, United States and works a Monday – Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm (UTC-5, Central Standard Time) schedule. It is imperative that all tea
mbers follow this schedule due to JRH Engineering clients being located in the Central Standard Time zone in the United States. JRH Engineering has specific project schedules with deadlines that need to be met and requires efforts from our staff to ensure that we meet our clients' expectations.



General Summary



The Residential Architect plays a critical role in the design and delivery of residential projects for JRH Engineering. The position is responsible for producing high-quality architectural drawings, construction documents, and design solutions that meet client expectations, local building codes, and project timelines. The Residential Architect collaborates closely with the engineering team, project managers, and clients to ensure that all deliverables reflect JRH Engineering's commitment to excellence.



Job Description:



The Residential Architect position will be responsible for the following tasks:

Develop architectural designs and construction documents for residential projects

Produce floor plans, elevations, sections, and detail drawings

Prepare specifications, schedules, and design narratives

Ensure all designs comply with applicable building codes, zoning ordinances, and HOA requirements

Coordinate with the civil engineering team on site planning and infrastructure

Collaborate on grading, drainage, utility layouts, and site access

Resolve design conflicts between architectural and civil/structural elements

Manage project documentation and design revisions throughout all project phases

Maintain organized drawing sets and version control

Track and incorporate client and jurisdictional review comments

Support the permitting and entitlement process

Prepare permit submittal packages for applicable US jurisdictions

Respond to plan check comments and coordinate with reviewing agencies

Provide Quality Assurance and Quality Control on all assigned projects

Review drawings for accuracy, completeness, and code compliance before submission

Identify and resolve design discrepancies early in the project lifecycle

Communicate project status, design challenges, and schedule impacts to the Director of Design

Support client interactions and design presentations as requested

Prepare visual materials (renderings, diagrams) to facilitate client understanding

Other tasks as requested by the leadership team



Qualifications



Minimum of 3 – 5 years of experience in residential architecture

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Architecture from an accredited institution

Licensed Architect (or actively pursuing licensure) preferred

Proficiency in AutoCAD and/or Revit; experience with SketchUp or other visualization tools is a plus

Working knowledge of US residential building codes (IRC), zoning regulations, and permitting processes

Strong technical drawing skills with a high attention to detail

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines

Experience working with US-based clients or on US residential projects is strongly preferred

Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a remote environment while collaborating with a distributed team

title: Client-Facing Senior Accountant - Work From Home
description:
You're not just looking for a job—you're looking to make a real difference. You've been in roles that challenge your skills, but something's missing: impact. What if there was a career where you could excel professionally while making a meaningful contribution to the world?



Join our mission-driven team at The Cashflow Doctor, where your accounting expertise directly supports fast-growth founders AND helps orphanages in Mexico thrive.



The Role

As our Senior Accountant, you'll be the strategic accounting partner for small businesses, agencies, and tech startups in a fast-paced, fully remote environment. This is a leadership role where you'll oversee client work, mentor tea
mbers, and ensure exceptional deliverables—all from the comfort of your home office.



Job Requirements:

- CPA with 5+ years of experience in QuickBooks Online (MUST be CPA)

- Natural leader with proven ability to oversee and guide others

- Exceptional at leading client meetings via Zoom with confidence and a Western native tone

- Available to work US Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours

- Strong track record collaborating with US-based clients

- Advanced Excel and accounting software skills

- Detail-oriented, accurate, and timely



Responsibilities:

- Client-Facing Accounting

- Deliver clean, accurate, timely bookkeeping (GAAP or cash basis)

- Lead Zoo
etings with clients, presenting financials and strategic recommendations

- Oversee and review peers' work to ensure quality standards

- Communicate with clients via Slack,
, and Zoom about financials, A/R, A/P, payroll, billings

- Create impactful spreadsheets for forecasts, budgets, and expansion planning

- Leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to streamline processes

- Identify improvements and efficiencies—think strategically, not just transactionally

- Take ownership of client relationships and team deliverables

- Provide high-level reporting to management



Your First 90 Days:

30 Days: Master our systems (
, Slack, Ignition, QuickBooks), complete training videos, handle client reconciliations on time, and build relationships across Accounting and Tax teams.



60 Days: Analyze client accounts to identify gaps and optimization opportunities, work independently with confidence, begin leading client presentations and reviewing peers' work, and select an orphanage or child-related cause to champion.



Who You Are:

You're detail-oriented yet strategic, friendly yet firm. You're a natural leader who inspires accountability. You thrive on solving problems, building clarity through data, and presenting complex information clearly on video calls. You love learning new systems and improving processes. You're a CPA with 5+ solid years of client-facing experience in fast-paced remote environments, and you're excited to collaborate with a global team during California business hours.



Why You'll Love Working With Us:

- Work From Home: Fully remote position—work from anywhere with reliable internet

- USA PST Hours: Collaborate with US clients during California business hours

- Low-Stress Culture: Healthy workloads and realistic expectations

- Flexible Fridays: Set your own 8-hour schedule every Friday

- 15 Days PTO Annually: Plus your birthday as a paid holiday

- End-of-Year Bonuses: Your hard work is rewarded

- Celebrations: Work anniversaries honored with personalized gifts

- Supportive Team: A culture that celebrates wins and fosters growth

- Mission-Driven: Support orphanages and build homes in Mexico

- Professional Development: Training, mentorship, and leadership opportunities



About Us

The Cashflow Doctor helps fast-growth founders scale through smart accounting and tax strategies, leveraging technology to save time and money. Giving back is core to who we are—our founder serves on the board of a nonprofit orphanage and a homebuilding organization in Mexico.



Ready to Apply?

We hire based on accomplishments and cultural fit. Submit your application and thoughtfully answer our assessment questions:



Please fill out the application form:

title: Remote CSR Agent ACTIVELY HIRING
description:
Remote CSR Agent ACTIVELY HIRING



Read This Before You Apply

This role is 100% voice-based. Every shift, you will be on the phone handling outbound and/or inbound calls for US clients. If you are looking for a chat,
, or non-voice position, this is not the role for you. We're looking for serious, long-term candidates fully committed to a professional voice career.

Applications without a voice recording will be automatically rejected



PLEASE SUBMIT A VOICE NOTE TO BE CONSIDERED IMMEDIATELY WITH RESUME.

APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VOICE NOTE OR RESUME WILL AUTOMATICALLY ARCHIVE.



About The Role

We are looking for a reliable, professional, and friendly Customer Service Agent to join our remote team. You will be the first point of contact for our US-based customers, handling inquiries, resolving issues, and delivering an excellent experience on every interaction. This is a long-term position with a stable schedule and consistent pay.



Shift window — your schedule will fall within:

Eastern Time (EST/EDT)

8:00 AM – 6:00 PM ET = 8:00 PM – 6:00 AM PHT

Exact shift will be confirmed upon hiring. Must be fully available and comfortable working night shifts.



Responsibilities

Respond to customer inquiries via phone in a timely and professional manner

Resolve complaints, process requests, and follow up to ensure customer satisfaction

Accurately log interactions and updates in the CRM system

Escalate complex issues to the appropriate team when needed

Meet or exceed KPIs, including response time, resolution rate, and CSAT scores

Maintain product knowledge to answer questions accurately

Adapt tone and communication style to each customer interaction



English language requirements

Strong English fluency is non-negotiable for this role.

Our customers are native English speakers. You must be able to communicate naturally, clearly, and professionally — both in writing and verbally without heavy reliance on scripts.

Near-native or fully fluent spoken and written English

Neutral or easily understood accent clear pronunciation is essential

Excellent grammar, spelling, and punctuation in written communication

Ability to rephrase, clarify, and de-escalate situations using natural language

Comfortable with American idioms, expressions, and cultural references

No heavy use of filler words or scripted-sounding responses

Confident communicator — you should be able to hold a conversation, not just read from a template

title: Instagram Outreach Assistant — Rise Ultra
description:
Job Title: Instagram DM Assistant (1-2 hour/day, part-time, long-term, potential for pay rise)



I run a sports charity events company called Rise Ultra and I'm looking for a reliable, detail-oriented assistant to help with daily Instagram outreach. This is a simple, repeatable task that takes approximately 1 hour per day.

What you'll do each day:



- Log into our Instagram account

- Check our followers or notifications list for new followers from the last 24 hours

- Send a templated DM to each new follower + personalise their name (template provided — no improvising) 

- Log each person you message in a shared Google Sheet (username, date, done, notes)

- Track replies, and followup with non-replies

- Log out



I will handle most replies personally. 

What I'm looking for:



Reliable and consistent — this needs to happen every single day

Honest and trustworthy — you will have login access to our account

Detail-oriented — no skipping people, no duplicate messages

Good English reading ability .

Available every day (including weekends or able to arrange cover)

Apply with 8AP.



What I'm NOT looking for:

Someone who will improvise or change the message template

Someone who will engage with replies or act outside the scope of work

Anyone who has previously had any accounts flagged or suspended



Hours: ~1-2 hour per day, 7 days a week.

Rate: $3-4/hour (negotiable for the right person)

Start: Immediately

Trial period: 1 week paid trial before long-term commitment



Benefits:

Potential for long-term pay rise

Part of a mission that supports people in need

Great management and fair, open communication

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Role: Virtual Assistant 

Hours: Full-time U.S. business hours



Overview:

We’re looking for a proactive, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to support day-to-day operations, marketing execution, and light growth initiatives. This role blends administrative support with digital execution, creative tasks, research, and forward-thinking problem-solving. The ideal candidate is organized, curious, comfortable with modern tools (including AI), and able to operate with minimal hand-holding after a reasonable training period.

Support will always be available to ensure mutual success.

This is not a purely reactive task role; we’re looking for someone who can think ahead, suggest improvements, and help simplify how work gets done.



Core Responsibilities

Proactive Support

• Aside from the items we know we need help with, provide ideas and recommendations based on your skillset and what the business could use help with.



Website & Digital Support

• Make updates and changes to a Squarespace website (small, simple website)

• Add and manage content  (pages, blog posts, images, basic formatting)

• Create simple website banners and imagery as needed



Graphic & Creative Support

• Create simple graphics for things like:

o LinkedIn posts

o Website imagery

o Podcast thumbnails 

• Work from brand direction and existing examples (not heavy design work)



AI & Productivity – we are not looking for expertise per se, but curiosity and the aptitude/drive to learn.

• Use AI tools to improve efficiency and speed (content drafts, summaries, ideas, workflows)

• Apply basic critical thinking when using AI (not just copy/paste)

• Rework prompts to achieve desired outcomes 

• Create a prompt library of successful and commonly used prompts 



Calendar & Admin Management

• Manage calendar and scheduling

• Coordinate meetings, provide event support, and help us focus on priorities

• Keep schedules clean, organized, and proactive

• Familiarity with Hubspot



LinkedIn & Light Growth Support

• Support LinkedIn publishing and organization

• Assist with light outbound sales activities (research, follow-ups, list prep)



Video, Podcast & Content Publishing

• Curiosity and willingness to help with basic video editing (AI tools are easy to learn and use)

• Assist with podcast workflows, including:

o Publishing to Spotify and podcast platforms

o Managing basic episode assets and descriptions



Writing & Communication

• Strong written English skills 

• Clear, professional, and concise communication



Bonus: Vacation Rental Growth & Optimization

When capacity allows, this role may also support growth initiatives for two vacation rental properties, including:

• Brainstorming and executing strategies to drive more traffic and bookings

• Supporting SEO / GEO (Generative Search Optimization) efforts for property listings and websites

• Helping improve listing descriptions, imagery positioning, and discoverability

• Researching platforms, keywords, and promotional ideas to increase occupancy

• Identifying creative ways to differentiate the properties and increase demand



Compensation Note for Rental Growth:

There is openness to discussing a commission or performance-based incentive tied to measurable increases in booked stays or revenue, based on mutually agreed goals and tracking.



Preferred Skills & Experience

• Strong experience working with Squarespace and Hubspot

• Proficiency with LinkedIn (platform knowledge, posting, basic engagement)

• Ability to create simple graphics (Canva, Figma, or similar tools)

• Comfort using AI tools to increase efficiency

• Excellent organizational and time-management skills

• Strong written English

• Ability to work independently and think critically

• Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

• Highly curious and motivated to learn new skills



Nice-to-Haves

• Basic video editing experience

• Podcast publishing experience

• Familiarity with outbound sales or event support

• Interest in marketing, growth, and modern tools

• Curiosity around SEO and demand generation



What Success Looks Like

• You make things easier 

• Calendars are clean, content is updated, and tasks move faster

• AI is used thoughtfully to save time and improve output

• Growth opportunities are identified and acted on proactively

• You operate like a trusted extension of the business, not just task support



Please send your resume to: 
 with cover letter explaining why you are the best candidate for this post.  We will reach out to shortlisted candidates with an invitation for an interview.  This is an urgent post. We will be shortlisting candidates within the week.



Thank you.

Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

title: AI-Powered Platform Builder — No Advanced Coding Required
description:
Attention: Failure to follow the application instructions will result in automatic disqualification.



ABOUT US



Ninja Customer Care (NCC) is a fast-growing AI-assisted customer experience company serving nutraceutical and telemedicine brands in the US market. We run a team of agents powered by real-time AI guidance and are building a Customer Intelligence Platform that will serve brands, networks, and DTC companies at scale.



We are a startup with serious traction, a clear product roadmap, and a founder who knows exactly what needs to be built. We are not figuring out the vision — we need someone who can execute it using today's AI tools.



THIS IS NOT A TRADITIONAL DEVELOPER ROLE



We are not looking for someone who writes complex code from scratch all day. The world has changed. AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot now do the heavy lifting of code generation.



What we need is someone who knows how to:

• Use AI coding tools to build real, working software

• Connect different systems and tools together via APIs

• Read and review AI-generated code to make sure it is correct

• Deploy working software to a server

• Communicate clearly about what is being built and why



If you have been using AI coding tools to build projects and you understand how systems connect — this role was written for you.



WHAT YOU WILL BE BUILDING



We are building a platform on top of our existing tools — Konnektive, CheckoutChamp, Dialpad, 
, and ActiveCampaign. You are not replacing these tools. You are connecting them and building an intelligence layer on top.



The platform includes:



• A data layer that pulls information from all our tools into one place

• A dashboard that shows clients their real-time performance

• Automated workflows that trigger alerts based on business rules

• A client portal where clients can log in and see their own data

• A churn prediction system that flags at-risk customers before they cancel

• A contact deflection system that handles routine customer inquiries automatically



You will receive a clear written spec for every module before you build it. You will use AI coding tools to build it. The founder will be involved throughout — you are never building blind.





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



MUST HAVE



• Real experience using AI coding tools to build something

  — Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar

  — You must show us something you have actually built using these tools

  — This is the most important requirement. Everything else is secondary.



• Basic understanding of APIs

  — You know what an API is, you have connected tools together before,

    you can read API documentation and figure out how to use it



• Ability to review and understand code

  — You do not need to write every line from scratch

  — But you need to read AI-generated code and know if it looks right



• Ability to deploy to a server

  — You have put something live before, even something small

  — DigitalOcean, AWS, Heroku — any of these is fine



• Strong English communication

  — You will talk to the founder daily

  — Clear, direct, no confusion



• Organized and reliable

  — You hit deadlines, you flag problems early, you do not disappear



NICE TO HAVE



• Familiarity with any of our tools: Konnektive, CheckoutChamp,

  Dialpad, 
, ActiveCampaign



• Experience building dashboards or data visualization



• Any exposure to databases — PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar



• Background working with US-based clients or companies



YOU DO NOT NEED



• A computer science degree

• Years of traditional software engineering experience

• To write complex algorithms or advanced code from scratch

• A big portfolio — one or two real AI-built projects is enough



HOW THIS WORKS



We start with a small paid trial project — one module, clear scope, fixed price ($300–$500). This is real work that goes into production if you deliver it correctly.



If you deliver — we move to a full-time monthly retainer. Long-term this role grows as the platform grows. We take care of people who perform.



You will never be left guessing what to build. Every sprint starts with a written spec. The founder is available daily. We move fast and we communicate clearly.



HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to 
 :



1. A brief introduction — who you are, where you are based, what you have been building lately (3–5 sentences is fine)



2. One example of something you built using an AI coding tool

   — A link, a short video, a GitHub repo, a screenshot with explanation

   — It does not have to be big or impressive — it just has to be real



3. Answer this question in 4–6 sentences:

   "If I asked you to connect two different software tools so that data from one automatically appears in the other, how would you approach that?"



Applications without all three items will not be reviewed.

We read every application that follows the instructions.

title: Cold Email & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist (Smartlead, Heyreach, Zapmail)
description:
Algominds is a London-based AI sales company hiring a Cold
 & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist based in the Philippines to manage and optimize outreach campaigns across our client accounts.



This is a hands-on execution role. You will be building, managing, and optimizing cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns daily using specific tools. This is not a general VA role.



YOU MUST HAVE DIRECT EXPERIENCE WITH THESE THREE PLATFORMS:



1. Smartlead.ai — campaign setup, mailbox rotation, lead management, warmup settings, master inbox management

2. 
 — LinkedIn automation, multi-sender campaigns, connection requests, messaging sequences

3. Zapmail.ai — domain setup, mailbox provisioning, DNS configuration, deliverability management



If you have not used all three of these tools, please do not apply. We will verify your experience on our onboarding call.



WHAT THE ROLE INVOLVES:



Build and launch cold
 campaigns in Smartlead across multiple client workspaces. Set up and manage LinkedIn outreach sequences in Heyreach. Provision and maintain
 infrastructure including domains, mailboxes, and DNS records in Zapmail. Monitor deliverability metrics, bounce rates, and warmup health daily. Manage lead uploads, list segmentation, and campaign targeting. Respond to and categorize replies in Smartlead master inbox. A/B test subject lines, copy, and sending schedules to improve open and reply rates. Report weekly on campaign performance across all client accounts. Coordinate with our London-based team via Slack.



COMPENSATION:



$300 per month base salary paid via Wise on the 1st of every month. Performance bonuses based on campaign metrics including reply rates and meetings booked. Top performers managing multiple client accounts earn $700 to $1,000+ per month. No cap on bonuses.



REQUIREMENTS:



Based in the Philippines. Proven hands-on experience with Smartlead.ai, 
, and Zapmail.ai. This is non-negotiable. Understanding of
 deliverability including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain reputation, and inbox placement. Experience writing or editing cold
 copy and LinkedIn messaging sequences. Comfortable managing multiple client campaigns simultaneously. Excellent written English. Reliable internet connection and laptop or PC. Wise account or willingness to create one. Available during overlapping hours with UK timezone for weekly check-ins.



PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED:



Experience with Clay, Instantly, Lemlist, or similar outreach tools. Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Experience working in an agency environment managing multiple client accounts. Understanding of B2B lead generation and ICP targeting.



IN YOUR APPLICATION PLEASE INCLUDE:



1. Which of the three tools Smartlead, Heyreach, and Zapmail you have the most experience with and for how long

title: 2D Motion Graphics Designer - Social Media & YouTube Content (After Effects + Premiere Pro)
description:
We are a growing social media content agency producing weekly Reels, TikToks, animated posts, and YouTube videos for clients across various industries. We are actively expanding our client base and building a reliable creative team.

We are looking for a talented 2D Motion Graphics Designer to join us long-term as a dedicated freelancer. This is NOT a one-time project — we need someone who can grow with us from part-time to full-time as we sign more clients.

What you will do:



Create animated Reels and short-form videos (30 seconds to 1.5 minutes) with custom 2D motion graphics

Create animated posts with motion elements (carousels, stories, static with animation)

Produce motion graphics for YouTube videos (intros, lower thirds, transitions, animated sequences) for clients who need longer-form content

Design kinetic typography, smooth transitions, animated text, and scroll-stopping hooks

Create custom graphic elements, icons, and visual assets for each client

Follow brand guidelines and maintain visual consistency across all deliverables

Deliver platform-ready files optimized for Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube (9:16, 1:1, 4:5, 16:9)

Work volume will increase as we onboard new clients — we want someone ready to scale with us



Required skills (non-negotiable):



Adobe After Effects — this is our primary tool, you MUST be highly proficient

Adobe Premiere Pro — for video editing, assembly, and final export

Adobe Illustrator and/or Photoshop — for creating graphic elements and visual assets

Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in 2D motion graphics

Strong understanding of social media content — you know what makes people stop scrolling

Clean animation principles: proper easing, timing, rhythm, and visual hierarchy

Ability to deliver within 24-48 hour turnaround per piece

Reliable internet connection and responsive communication



Nice to have:



Basic Cinema 4D or Blender knowledge for simple 3D elements

Experience with YouTube content (intros, outros, animated overlays, chapter transitions)

Experience producing content for brands or agencies

Understanding of current social media trends and formats

Ability to manage multiple client projects at the same time



DO NOT APPLY if:



You only use CapCut, Canva, or template-based tools — we need real After Effects work

You have less than 2 years of motion graphics experience

You cannot provide a showreel or portfolio with real project examples

You are looking for a one-time gig — this is a long-term position



HOW TO APPLY — PLEASE READ CAREFULLY:

Your application MUST include all 4 of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



A link to your showreel or portfolio (Vimeo, Google Drive, Behance, or personal website) showing your best 2D motion graphics work

At least 3 examples of content you have created (Reels, animated posts, YouTube motion graphics, or short-form videos)

Your hourly rate in USD

A short message (2-3 sentences maximum) telling us what makes you stand out



To increase your chances of being selected, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a brief test based on a real client brief. This is your opportunity to show us your skills, speed, and creative thinking in a real working scenario.

We pay weekly. No delays, no excuses — you deliver quality work, you get paid on time, every week.

We are building something long-term and we want the right person by our side. If you are consistent, reliable, and passionate about motion design, we want to hear from you.

title: Video Editor (Remote)
description:
Video Editor (Remote) | U.S. Family Law Brand



Are you creative, detail oriented, and serious about storytelling that actually moves people to act? We are hiring a Full Time Video Editor to turn raw attorney/education footage into polished, on brand videos that inform, inspire, and convert. This is a production role with clear output targets. If you need hand holding, this isn’t for you.



Job Description:

You will own the end to end video pipeline, from assembling rough cuts to publishing on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and our website. You will deliver clean edits, strong pacing, crisp captions, and optimized thumbnails, all while following brand and legal compliance guidelines for a family law practice. Your work will be measured, not guessed: output, quality, and audience growth.



Key Responsibilities:

• Produce attorney/educational videos for YouTube and short form for Reels/TikTok/Shorts.

• Add captions, lower thirds (attorney name/title), thumbnails, and CTA end cards.

• Export in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 1:1.

• Upload and optimize across platforms (metadata, chapters, tags, end screens, cards).

• Apply YouTube SEO best practices (titles, descriptions, chapters, tags, schema).

• Maintain structured project folders in Google Drive (or other tools) with naming conventions and backups.

• Manage versions and handoffs so anyone can find what they need in under a minute.

• Track performance (watch time, retention, CTR, follower growth) and propose improvements.

• Coordinate schedules with attorneys and freelance videographers; hit deadlines without delays.

• Ensure legal disclaimers and confidentiality standards are applied consistently.



Performance Expectations:

1. Output

 • 4–6 long form attorney/educational videos per month.

 • 30–40 short form reels/TikToks per month.

 • 5–10 static assets (thumbnails, carousels) per month.



2. Quality & Branding

 • 100% of videos include captions, lower thirds, CTA end cards, and required aspect ratios.

 • 95% brand consistency (logo, fonts, colors, tone).

 • 100% required legal disclaimers included; captions properly timed and readable.



3. Engagement & Reach (within 6–12 months)

 • +15–20% average video watch time

 • +10–15% social engagement (likes, comments, shares)

 • +5–8% YouTube CTR via improved thumbnails/titles

 • +20% growth in YouTube subscribers or TikTok/Instagram followers



4. Collaboration & Efficiency

 •  95% of content delivered on schedule per content calendar.

 • 80–90% of attorney filming sessions successfully coordinated with videographers.

 • 100% of final edits reviewed and approved within 72 hrs of draft delivery.



Qualifications:

 • Strong editing skills in Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve (After Effects or Motion a plus).

 • At least 2+ years of experience editing for YouTube and/or social media platforms.

 • Sharp sense of pacing, structure, and audience retention (hooks, pattern breaks, CTA placement).

 • Excellent organization: you respect file structures, version control, and deadlines.

 • Professionalism and discretion with sensitive family law topics.

 • Proficiency with Google Workspace and project tools (Asana, Trello, or similar).

 • Bonus: YouTube SEO, GA4/analytics, or content marketing experience.



Work Schedule:

 • Full time (40 hours per week).

 • Must be available to work during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours for team coordination.



Screening Questions (answer all to be considered)

1. Do you have at least 2 years of video editing experience? Briefly describe the project types and your role.

2. Have you created content for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, or Shorts? Share links and note what you owned (edit, captions, thumbnail, etc.).

3. What editing software do you primarily use, and what’s your level of expertise?

4. How do you manage file organization and version control across multiple concurrent projects?

5. Link your reel/portfolio that best demonstrates storytelling, pacing, and results (watch time, CTR, or growth if available).



----------------------------------------------

How to Apply

 • Submit your resume, cover letter, and answers to all screening questions directly.

 • Use the subject line: “Video Editor – [Your Name] – Empower.”

 • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



If you can deliver consistent, on brand edits, move fast without sacrificing accuracy, and back your creative choices with data, we want to see your work!

title: Junior Integration Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a motivated Junior Integration Specialist to join our Managed Service Provider (MSP) team. In this role, you won't just manage one system, you will be the "bridge builder" for our diverse portfolio of business clients, helping to connect their various software platforms so their data flows seamlessly.

 

This is a client-facing technical role designed for someone who understands system logic and is eager to master enterprise-level tools like Boomi, Salesforce, and Power Automate across multiple different client environments. You will work under the guidance of senior specialists to build, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated "pipes" that keep our clients' businesses running efficiently.

 

Key Responsibilities

      • Client Integration Monitoring & Support

        o Monitor daily integration logs across multiple client environments to ensure data is syncing correctly.

        o Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve integration errors or data sync failures for various client systems.

        o Maintain clear technical documentation for each client’s unique integration workflows and data mappings.



      • Workflow Automation for Clients

         o Help build and test automated workflows to reduce manual data entry for our clients' business teams.

         o Assist in setting up automated alerts, notifications, and scheduled tasks within client environments.

         o Update and optimize existing client automations as their business requirements evolve.



      • Data Integrity & CRM Support

        o Assist with data cleanup, mapping, and bulk imports into client CRMs and other business tools.

        o Help configure client system settings (custom fields, user permissions, etc.) to support new integrations.

        o Verify that client data remains consistent across their various platforms (e.g., ERP to CRM sync).



      • Requirements Gathering & Consulting

        o Partner with client stakeholders to understand their business processes and document their technical requirements.

        o Participate in the testing and QA phase of new system rollouts for clients.

        o Actively train on our core tech stack (Boomi, Salesforce, Power BI/Automate) to take on more complex client builds.

 

Qualifications

Required

     • Technical Aptitude: A strong interest in system logic and a desire to build a career in technical integrations and automation.

     • Basic API Knowledge: A foundational understanding of what an API is and familiarity with data formats like JSON.

     • Comfort with APIs: Ability to read technical documentation to understand how different software platforms can be connected.

     • Business Process Mindset: Ability to look at a client's manual task and visualize how it could be automated.

     • Customer Service Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to explain technical status to non-technical client contacts.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

     • 0–2 years of experience in an MSP, IT support, or junior technical role.

     • Exposure to any CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) or automation tool (Zapier, Power Automate, etc.).

     • Experience using Excel for data organization or basic troubleshooting.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2586) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Private Equity: Manager of Acquisitions & Asset Management
description:
About Us

Three Little Pigs Investment Services is a multifamily real estate private equity firm with 450+ units under management. We acquire, reposition, and manage value-add apartment communities through a vertically integrated platform spanning acquisitions, property management, renovations, and investor syndication. We're growing fast and building the team to match.



About the Role

This is a dual-function role covering both sides of the investment lifecycle. On the acquisitions side, you'll source deals, build underwriting models, manage the pipeline, and coordinate due diligence through closing. On the asset management side, you'll drive portfolio performance, oversee property operations, produce investor reporting, and manage lender compliance.

You'll report directly to the Managing Principal and have high visibility across every phase of the investment cycle. This is a high-autonomy, high-ownership role for someone who wants to build something, not just maintain it.



What You'll Do



Acquisitions:

Source on-market and off-market multifamily deals through broker relationships and direct outreach

Underwrite deals using dynamic Excel models (IRR, equity multiple, cash-on-cash, cap rate, DSCR)

Review OMs, rent rolls, T12 financials, and operating statements

Manage the deal tracker, prepare investment memos, and draft LOIs

Coordinate due diligence from LOI through closing



Asset Management:

Oversee weekly property operations with the PM team; monitor occupancy, collections, and maintenance

Manage monthly financial reporting, variance analysis, and operating budgets

Prepare quarterly investor update letters and coordinate K-1 delivery

Manage lender compliance reporting and loan covenant tracking

Run annual sell/refi/hold analysis on each asset



What We're Looking For

Required:



3+ years in commercial real estate acquisitions, asset management, or investment analysis

Strong Excel financial modeling skills (DCF, sensitivity analysis)

Familiarity with multifamily operating metrics and deal structures

Experience with investor reporting and property management oversight

Excellent written communication skills; high attention to detail

Self-directed and comfortable in a lean, fast-moving environment



Preferred:

CPA License

Experience with AppFolio, QuickBooks Online, Notion, or Property Meld

Familiarity with AI tools for underwriting and workflow automation

Knowledge of syndication structures and LP/GP relationships



Position Details

Location: Remote (US hours required)

Type: Full-Time

Reports To: Managing Principal

title: Google Ads Manager for Call-Driven Local Clinic
description:
Google Ads Manager for Call-Driven Local Clinic



We are looking for a Google Ads Manager to take over and improve a local clinic account where almost all conversions come through phone calls, not forms.



This is not a basic traffic-management role. We need someone who understands how to improve lead quality, reduce wasted spend, and diagnose whether issues are coming from campaign structure, search terms, conversion tracking, messaging, landing pages, or call handling.



We want someone who can think like an operator, not just make surface-level recommendations.



What you’ll be responsible for



Managing and optimizing Google Ads Search campaigns for a local service business

Auditing campaign structure, keyword strategy, match types, negative keywords, bidding, ad copy, assets, geotargeting, devices, and dayparting

Reviewing call-heavy conversion setups and identifying tracking gaps

Improving lead quality, not just increasing click volume

Aligning campaigns and landing pages with service intent

Providing clear reporting on what is proven by data versus what still needs better tracking



What we’re looking for



Strong experience with Google Ads Search for local lead generation

Experience with call-driven accounts where phone calls are the main conversion

Strong understanding of search term analysis, negative keyword strategy, device and geographic performance, and conversion-focused optimization

Ability to identify when tracking is incomplete and explain how that affects recommendations

Ability to think beyond the ad account and diagnose real business bottlenecks

Clear, direct communication with no fluff



Preferred



Experience with healthcare, clinics, urgent care, or other high-intent local service accounts

Experience with call tracking platforms and offline conversion strategy

Experience improving lead quality in accounts where raw conversion counts can be misleading



To apply, please answer the following:



How would you audit a local Google Ads account where about 99% of conversions are phone calls?

What can Google Ads tell you about phone call conversions, and what can it not tell you without additional tracking?

If tracking is incomplete, how would that affect your audit conclusions and recommendations?

What are the first 5 to 10 things you would review in a call-driven local account?

How would you determine whether poor performance is caused by campaign structure, search terms, conversion setup, landing pages, or front-desk handling?



Please keep your answers practical and specific. We are not looking for generic Google Ads best practices. We are looking for someone who can diagnose, prioritize, and improve a real call-based account.

title: Data Entry Analyst (With Accounting or Auditing Skills)
description:
PLEASE FILL OUT THIS LINK TO START AN APPLICATION:
